### Jack Kruse — 2026-05-01T18:15:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/endosymbiosis-lagrangian.32417/post-372735>

NOW CONFIRMED: Oxygen can be created without photosynthesis. Scientists have discovered that the deep ocean produces oxygen without sunlight, challenging the belief that photosynthesis is the only source of life-sustaining air.
In the absolute darkness 13,000 feet below the Pacific surface, a team led by the Scottish Association for Marine Science has discovered "dark oxygen," produced entirely without sunlight. While surveying the Clarion-Clipperton Zone, researchers identified polymetallic nodules, potato-sized rocks rich in cobalt and nickel that function as natural "geobatteries."
These electrically charged rocks generate enough voltage to trigger seawater electrolysis, a chemical process that splits H2O into hydrogen and oxygen. This finding overturns centuries of biological theory which held that only photosynthetic life like plants and algae could generate oxygen. This geological breakthrough could rewrite the origins of life on Earth, suggesting that aerobic organisms may have evolved in the deep sea long before photosynthesis began on the surface. However, the discovery also introduces a significant conflict for the green energy transition. These same oxygen-producing nodules are the primary targets for deep-sea mining companies seeking metals for electric vehicle batteries.
By harvesting these minerals, we may inadvertently destroy the very mechanisms that oxygenate and sustain the abyssal ecosystem, forcing scientists to urgently reassess the ecological costs of mineral extraction. But this finding should raise a big question in your minds.....

**CITE**

Sweetman, A. K., et al. Evidence of dark oxygen production at the abyssal seafloor. Nature Geoscience.

## What pulsed magnetic field (PMF) seed treatments do:​

-   **Higher germination % and faster emergence** – usually a 5–15% bump in germination and earlier, more uniform sprouting compared with untreated controls.
-   **Improved vigor indices** – longer seedlings, greater fresh and dry mass, stronger early root and shoot growth.
-   **Better physiological status** – higher chlorophyll, photosynthetic rate, stomatal conductance, and sometimes higher leaf protein or oil content in crops like soy.
-   **Reviving aged or low‑vigor seed** – in aged green pea, specific PMF protocols boosted germination by ~6–8% and vigor index by ~80% over old controls, effectively “rebooting” tired seed.
-   There is **strong genotype and parameter dependence**: species and even cultivars respond differently, and effects depend heavily on field strength, orientation, exposure time, and humidity.
-   _****_There is a “sweet spot” range – too weak or too strong / too long can reduce benefits or even harm vigor._****_

So a seed is basically a tiny dynamo, semiconductor, and water battery all rolled into one. Over time, storage and stress drag it toward a more chaotic, oxidized, low‑vigor state. Hitting it with a pulsed magnetic field is like giving it a precise, patterned magnetic nudge that reshuffles charge, boosts water uptake, improves its redox balance, so when it finally hits soil it can actually hear and respond to the geomagnetic and local environmental signals again.

This has me thinking back to years ago when we discussed PEMF and there was a lot of controversy surrounding the subject. During the PEMF guru phase that a lot of us remember, just a bunch of dumbass gurus using PMF willy nilly without the understanding. **_There is a “sweet spot” range – too weak or too strong / too long can reduce benefits or even harm vigor._** This is interesting that PMF can reboot the seeds but also a MASSIVE indication that a catastrophe is unfolding.

**The Dielectric Shield:** Petrochemicals have an extremely low dielectric constant, making them [excellent insulators](https://www.mdpi.com/2227-9717/10/11/2376). By sitting in [dense underground rock](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/us-now-more-oil-reserves-180800487.html), they act as a **"Faraday Cage"** for the [continental Z-axis](https://svs.gsfc.nasa.gov/4840/).

**The SAA Buffer:** As the SAA expands westward, countries like [Saudi Arabia](https://www.facebook.com/groups/828178678983076/posts/1208487474285526/) and the United States use their [vast oil reserves](https://naturalgasintel.com/news/thanks-to-shale-us-tops-saudi-arabia-russia-in-recoverable-oil-reserves-says-rystad/) to "dampen" the [Magnetic Stutter](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2025GL118899). Where the surface is a "Magnetic Desert," the underground [oil is the "Magnetic Oasis"](https://www.facebook.com/ScienceNaturePage/posts/the-middle-east-holds-half-of-the-worlds-conventional-oil-reserves-but-why-the-s/1490028182578046/).

**2\. The U.S. as the "Isotopic Refinery" of the Planet**
My clinical "Power" stats: America is the **Energy Superpower** because it holds the most recoverable "Coherence".

**Production Dominance:** At [13.6 million barrels/day](https://thehonestsorcerer.medium.com/bye-bye-saudi-america-a464299b5174), the U.S. is out-producing Saudi Arabia (9.3M) and Russia (9.1M).

**Natural Gas Lead:** Producing [43.2 trillion cubic feet in 2025](https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump4President/posts/americas-energy-superpower-dominating-global-oil-and-gasthe-united-states-is-the/1404921044997254/) means the U.S. is "rectifying" a quarter of the world's gas-phase "Information".

3\. The Permian Basin: The "Z-Axis" Piston
The Permian Basin’s 6.6 million barrels a day is the **Organismal Stator** of the continent. \[[1](https://thehonestsorcerer.medium.com/bye-bye-saudi-america-a464299b5174)\]

**Geological Torque:** This concentrated hydrocarbon mass creates a localized **Magnetic High** that helps the U.S. [resist the "Siberian Jerk"](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/242509893_Aeromagnetics_of_southern_Alberta_within_areas_of_hydrocarbon_accumulation). It is the mechanical and magnetic "ballast" that keeps North America from undergoing the [rapid "Maillard-Orange" collapse](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2012JASTP..74..129D/abstract) seen in the [South Atlantic](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/earth-science/articles/10.3389/feart.2016.00040/full).

**4\. Seabeds and Oxygen: The Missing "Geobatteries"**

The final "Paradigm Gap": the **"Paucity of Ferromagnetic Atoms"** in the seabeds.

**The Low-Oxygen Zone:** Areas with low [cobalt/nickel nodules](https://isa.org.jm/exploration-contracts/exploration-areas/) (the geobatteries) cannot split the water via [electrolysis](https://www.facebook.com/TheSpokesPersonPage/posts/-india-scientists-have-discovered-that-rocks-called-polymetallic-nodules-on-the-/790233706993539/). They have **Low "Dark Oxygen" creation.

The SAA Connection:** This is why the SAA is situated over the South Atlantic Ocean. The seabed there is ["Isotopically Malnourished,"](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/earth-science/articles/10.3389/feart.2020.00375/full) leading to a weak dynamo and a collapse of the local 160-signal.

**My Synthesis:** America’s 46 billion barrels of crude are the **"Magnetic Insurance Policy"** for the 2026 transition. By sitting on world-class reserves, the U.S. is maintaining a [Topological Shield](https://www.usgs.gov/maps/magnetic-anomaly-map-north-america) that allows its 2% Brain / 20% Power population to stay **Phase-Locked** to the **Universal Stator**

>
> ## What pulsed magnetic field (PMF) seed treatments do:​
>
> -   **Higher germination % and faster emergence** – usually a 5–15% bump in germination and earlier, more uniform sprouting compared with untreated controls.
> -   **Improved vigor indices** – longer seedlings, greater fresh and dry mass, stronger early root and shoot growth.
> -   **Better physiological status** – higher chlorophyll, photosynthetic rate, stomatal conductance, and sometimes higher leaf protein or oil content in crops like soy.
> -   **Reviving aged or low‑vigor seed** – in aged green pea, specific PMF protocols boosted germination by ~6–8% and vigor index by ~80% over old controls, effectively “rebooting” tired seed.
> -   There is **strong genotype and parameter dependence**: species and even cultivars respond differently, and effects depend heavily on field strength, orientation, exposure time, and humidity.
> -   _****_There is a “sweet spot” range – too weak or too strong / too long can reduce benefits or even harm vigor._****_
>
> So a seed is basically a tiny dynamo, semiconductor, and water battery all rolled into one. Over time, storage and stress drag it toward a more chaotic, oxidized, low‑vigor state. Hitting it with a pulsed magnetic field is like giving it a precise, patterned magnetic nudge that reshuffles charge, boosts water uptake, improves its redox balance, so when it finally hits soil it can actually hear and respond to the geomagnetic and local environmental signals again.
>

### TristynFerlita — 2026-03-19T21:16:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/becoming-a-savage.32429/post-369232>

Almost 10 years ago I remembered choosing to live and be born on this planet.
Up to that moment I didn't even believe in God, I knew there was something greater but I wanted that thing whatever it was to prove to me it was real or I wasn't buying it. I finally got my request granted and realized I was connected to this energy that was everything, call it God, call it the universe, call it consciousness, regardless I was a piece of it.

I have done some of the craziest shit you can imagine when it come to pushing the limits of my mind and body, most were detrimental like drugs and terrible sleep and total dehydration and chaos and being practically a full time criminal and partying like a rockstar. I truly lived life skating on the edge because the fact of the matter was I was too much of a coward to become a true savage.

To Become one who is:
For the truth forever and always no matter what
In-Love with life
Connected to nature/God
Fulfilling a purpose that helps this planet and its obviously low consciousness beings

Lets face there isnt very many poeple I like in this life but its becasue they give a fuck about the wrong shit.

To anyone reading this i hope that hits you because you might be one of the ones focused on the wrong shit.

What's right or wrong is irrelevant but what I really mean is focused on things that aren't relative in the true scope of life.

For example, I have never seen so many stupid questions and people that truly have health issues that are more worried about such a quick cheat code on how they're going to beat the system that is actively trying to kill them.

I work for a restaurant consulting firm and own my own restaurant in the outskirts of Tampa.

The moment I realized that almost 1000% my environment is killing me, fuck the restaurant fuck the consulting firm, I went to the middle of nowhere slept in the woods realized that's not enough, then sell it all get the fuck out. Or simply figure it out, that's it.

I wasn't worried about well how can I stay and explain this to my family, fuck them if they don't want to be set free and want to be part of the machine then so be it.

My point is dedicate your life to the solution, to the signal, stop listening to the noise.
If you don't know the difference then get in the fucking sun, get connected because if not then your cooked, your screwed, your mind doesn't work its turned off, I know the experience because I'm going through it right now and it sucks for my brain to feel even a little off because then I feel like an absolute idiot like most people, no offense.

Theres a reason I haven't paid for the consultation, because I look at Jack as a teacher a master, when my Teacher appears and says here I have put these pieces together for you (blogs, webinars, podcast, Forum posts, Tweets, ect) and I say “yeah but I just want you to tell me what's wrong with me.” Its almost a like a slap in the face and extremely disrespectful for me not to take the time and at least do everything in my power to understand what the teacher is trying to show me, regardless these are a few things I've tried to put together to heal this gut of mine but it isnt the gut im healing is it, all from a combination of a bunch of blogs and forum posts so here we go!

Jack if you read this call me the fuck out because I want to learn the truth.

What I’m really starting to understand is that I’m not just trying to figure out my vagus nerve. That’s only one side of the story because that’s the side I’m feeling most directly right now through the gut, the spasms, the anxiety pattern, the chest and neck tightening, and this whole sense that my system is stuck in a stress loop. But the bigger truth I feel like I’m waking up to is that this is really about how health works at the deepest level.

What I’m trying to do is pull all the pieces together, not just to explain one symptom, but to understand the architecture of life itself in a practical way. The vagus nerve matters, my gut matters, the microbiome matters, but they’re not isolated things. They’re pieces inside a much bigger system. What I’m seeing is that health is really about whether I’m aligned with the environment and the deeper laws that govern how the body organizes energy, information, timing, structure, and repair.
The more I sit with this, the more I realize the body is not just chemistry. It’s not just food, supplements, lab markers, detoxes, or symptom management. The body is a light-driven, water-structured, electrically organized, mitochondrially regulated system. It is constantly reading the environment and building itself from that information. That means light, water, magnetism, circadian timing, redox state, melanin, mitochondrial signaling, and the electric properties of cells all sit upstream of what we call symptoms.

So my gut issue is real, but I’m starting to see it as a downstream expression of a deeper systems problem. The way I understand it now, if the microbial filter is weak, then distorted input reaches the vagus nerve. The vagus nerve sends that distorted information upward. The brain reads danger instead of homeostasis. That turns on stress. Stress weakens the calming anti-inflammatory side of the vagus nerve. Then the gut barrier gets leakier, and then even more distorted signal gets through. So it becomes a self-feeding loop. That helps explain why this doesn’t just feel like “my stomach is off.” It feels like my whole body is trapped in an alarm state.

What’s clicking now is that the vagus nerve is not the whole story. It’s one major relay point in a larger network. It’s a sensing and regulating bridge between the gut, the brain, the inflammatory state, the barrier state, and the environment the body is trying to interpret. So yes, I’m dealing with bad vagus nerve problems, but the real thing I’m chasing is the bigger truth underneath it all: what allows the body to live in coherence versus what pushes it into distortion.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

That’s where the light and circadian piece matters so much. The slide helped me see that light is upstream of timing, and timing is upstream of metabolism. Light is tied into NAD+, SIRT1, ATP/AMP, AMPK, clock genes, protein translation, mitochondrial biogenesis, and oxidative phosphorylation. So the body is basically running on a solar-timed operating system. If the light environment is wrong, then the timing is wrong. If the timing is wrong, the metabolism is wrong. If the metabolism is wrong, then the signal coming out of mitochondria is wrong. And if that signal is wrong, then everything downstream, including the gut-vagus-brain loop, becomes more unstable.

The redox paper pushes that even deeper. What I’m taking from it is that health is being framed less as a chemistry problem and more as an electrical and informational problem. The paper says that redox power drives electrical activity in cells and that these electrical changes come before downstream genetic changes, protein behavior, tissue repair, and even the shape and function of organs. It keeps making the point that mitochondrial electrical signaling is upstream of biochemistry and that sunlight is the major environmental source shaping those electrical variations. It even says “redox potential is king for health” and frames mitochondrial electric power generation as the key to a healthy long life.

So when I layer that into everything else, what I’m seeing is that this isn’t just about “fixing digestion” or even “fixing vagal tone.” It’s about improving the electric and informational state of the system itself. If the redox state is poor, then electrical signaling is poor. If electrical signaling is poor, then the cell’s timing, protein behavior, repair, inflammatory signaling, and tissue organization all go off track. The redox paper even ties electric gradients to tissue repair, morphology, and the behavior of cells more broadly, while arguing that mitochondria are the critical information center in that process.

That’s why I keep coming back to the realization that you cannot just think locally anymore. The vagus nerve is local in one sense because I feel it directly, but it is being affected by an upstream environment that is shaping light input, mitochondrial behavior, water structure, electric gradients, and the redox potential of the entire system. So my issue is not just “my gut is bad.” My issue is that the whole orchestra may be out of tune, and the gut-vagus loop is one of the loudest places I’m hearing it.

The water piece ties into that too. I’m starting to understand that the water that matters most in this framework isn’t just the water I drink, but the water my mitochondria build inside my cells. That water is being described like a structured protective medium, almost like a living shield or cage, where melanin and hemoglobin act like natural semiconductors. So this isn’t just hydration in the normal sense. It’s about building the right internal environment so the body can hold coherence, protect itself, and run the right electrical and signaling patterns.

And that leads into the bigger realization I’m trying to put into words: what I’m really after is not just symptom relief. What I’m after is alignment with who we truly are. I’m starting to see health less as fighting disease and more as removing the mismatch between my biology and the field I’m living in. The deeper truth seems to be that nature already built the original system: sunlight, darkness, water, breath, cold, sound, magnetism, melanin, mitochondrial signaling, circadian timing, redox power. Modern life replaces that with artificial light, nnEMF, indoor living, noise, disconnected routines, and chemical shortcuts. Then we get sick and try to patch over the symptoms without correcting the field that shaped them.

So this is what I feel like I’m coming to: healing my gut is not just “do something to the vagus nerve.” Healing is learning how life is meant to work, and then getting back into alignment with it. The vagus nerve is one expression of that. The gut is one expression of that. The redox state is one expression of that. Light timing is one expression of that. Water structure is one expression of that. Mitochondrial signaling is one expression of that. They are all pieces of the same living system.
That means the real work is to keep pulling these pieces together until the pattern becomes undeniable. Not just so I can explain my symptoms, but so I can understand the truth of health more completely. That’s why I want to keep layering in more and more. Because I don’t think this is about collecting random ideas anymore. I think this is about seeing one integrated model emerge: how energy becomes information, how information becomes structure, how structure becomes function, and how function becomes health or disease.

To Understand how it all plays together.

> go lower.......Glucagon gene. Human Exhaust. You need a clean out Rock Star. That is where Savages manifest and unfurl.

From reading **CPC 79**, this is what I came to.

What I did not see before is that my problem did not start in the gut. My problem started in the **signal**. More specifically, it started in the **light-timed control system** that is supposed to run the body. That is the piece I missed.

What I’m understanding now is that the body is not just chemistry. It is running on **light, timing, redox, and mitochondrial power**. The body has to receive the right light signal, turn that into the right timing signal, and use that timing signal to control metabolism, repair, turnover, and clearing. If that signal gets jammed, the whole downstream system starts falling apart.

That is where **POMC** comes in. The way I see it now, **POMC is part of the upper clocking system**. It helps carry the timing signal from the light environment into the body. It is part of the machinery that tells the body what time it is at the deepest biological level — when to repair, when to move energy, when to purge, when to clear.

Then comes the piece I really did not understand before: **GCG**, the glucagon gene.

What I’m seeing now is that **GCG is not just a blood sugar gene**. It is the **lower execution layer**. It is tied to the gut’s timed clearing program — **motility, turnover, exocrine function, and purge**. So if POMC is the upper clock, then **GCG is the lower drain**. POMC sets the timing. GCG helps the body clear on rhythm.

That is the part that finally clicked for me.

The real chain is this:

**nnEMF and blue light damage the light signal.**
That damages the **clock** and **POMC timing**.
That damages **mitochondrial matrix control** and **redox power**.
That damages the **GCG-driven gut exhaust rhythm**.
Then the **gut backs up**.

That is the whole thing.

So it is deeper than just saying my optical fidelity got messed up. What I’m seeing is that the **light-timed optical system matters because it is what controls mitochondrial function**. Once that signal is jammed, the mitochondria lose proper control, redox drops, power drops, timing drops, and then the lower gut exhaust system stops working on rhythm.

That means the gut problem is not the first domino. The gut problem is what happens after the upper signal gets wrecked.

So the real breakdown becomes simple.

The body is supposed to work like this:
the **light environment** sets the **clock**,
the **clock** controls **mitochondrial function**,
the mitochondria maintain **redox and power**,
and that power allows the lower systems to **move, renew, vent, and clear** correctly.

But if the light signal is wrong, then the clock is wrong. If the clock is wrong, then mitochondrial control is wrong. If mitochondrial control is wrong, redox drops. If redox drops, the lower gut clearing system loses its rhythm. Then the gut stops being a clean exit and starts becoming a **sink**.

That is why this hit me so hard.

Because what I thought was a gut issue is actually a **signal collapse** first, a **mitochondrial power problem** second, and a **gut exhaust problem** after that.

And that is where all the rest fits in.

**Blue light** and **nnEMF** are not small issues in this model. They are upstream destroyers. They attack the light signal, the clock, and the mitochondrial control system. **Melanin disruption** weakens the body’s battery and optical switching. **Glyphosate and the chemical burden** make the system heavier and dirtier. **GLP-1 drugs** attack the lower drain by blocking turnover and jamming the exhaust rhythm. So the upper timing system gets damaged, and then the lower clearing system gets blocked.

That is why this is so much deeper than digestion. It is not just “my gut is inflamed.” It is that my **light timing got wrecked**, my **mitochondrial matrix control got wrecked**, my **redox dropped**, and then my **glucagon-driven lower exhaust system stopped clearing on rhythm**.

So the part I did not see before is this:

I kept looking at the symptom.
I kept looking at the gut.
I kept looking at the discomfort.
But the real thing I should have been looking at was the **clock-to-mitochondria-to-drain chain**.

Because once the **clock** gets broken,
the **mitochondria** lose proper control.
Once the **mitochondria** lose proper control,
**redox and power** drop.
Once **redox and power** drop,
the **GCG drain** cannot run right.
And once the **drain** cannot run right,
the gut starts backing up.

That is the missing piece I did not see.

And the solution becomes clearer because of that.

The answer is not just to force the gut. The answer is to **restore the upstream signal**.

I need to rebuild the **photoelectric effect** inside my biology.
I need to raise my **redox**.
I need to restore **redox potential**.
I need to restore **light timing**, **circadian rhythm**, **melanin function**, and **mitochondrial signaling**.
I need to reduce the things that are jamming the signal — **blue light, nnEMF, artificial environments, bad timing, and the whole mismatch field** I’ve been living in.

That is why all the earlier things we talked about still matter so much: **sunrise, sunset, full-spectrum natural light, darkness at night, less artificial blue light, less nnEMF, grounding, sleep timing, breath, water, cold, nature, and getting back into the real field my biology was built for.** Those are not random wellness tricks. They are the things that restore the **signal**, restore the **clock**, restore **mitochondrial power**, and give the lower gut system a chance to find its rhythm again.

So the deepest way I can say it now is this:

I am not just trying to heal my gut.
I am trying to **restore the light-timed power supply that runs the gut’s clearing system**.

Because what was actually going on the whole time was this:
my **light signal got jammed**,
my **POMC timing got distorted**,
my **mitochondrial matrix control got damaged**,
my **redox fell**,
and then my **glucagon-driven lower exhaust system stopped working on rhythm**.

That is why the whole thing turned into a loop.

The truth I came to is simple:

**POMC is the clock.
Mitochondria are the power plant.
Redox is the power.
GCG is the drain.
The photoelectric effect is the master signal.**

And if I want out, I do not start by worshiping the symptom. I start by rebuilding the **signal, the clock, and the power supply** so the drain can work again.

# Thread: Crossroads with my college aged daughter - what to do next for the health and wealth of our family
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/crossroads-with-my-college-aged-daughter-what-to-do-next-for-the-health-and-wealth-of-our-family.32430/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Annelieuk — 2026-03-19T21:33:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/crossroads-with-my-college-aged-daughter-what-to-do-next-for-the-health-and-wealth-of-our-family.32430/post-369233>

Hi everyone, just wondering if anyone has any ideas or experience to share.

My 19-year-old daughter is at a bit of a crossroads. We’re from the UK, and she’s been offered a fantastic football scholarship in Kentucky, as well as a places the top universities here in the U.K. We wanted her to go to Tampa for better weather, but just too much competition! However, as a family we’ve recently had something of an epiphany and are seriously considering turning these down and moving back to Costa Rica, where my children grew up (we left about 10 years ago).

There are a few moving parts that make this a tricky decision. My other daughter is currently sitting her A-levels, so the timing isn’t ideal. What’s really driving this, though, is a strong feeling that we need leave the UK ASAP. Also, my eldest daughter, despite being an amazing athlete and very bright, struggles with general anxiety and has a history of OCD, along with some loss of melanin on her back. She feels noticeably better, both physically and mentally, when she’s in the sun, and often says she feels her best by the beach (all her anxiety just goes) But she’s finding it hard to reconcile that with committing to four years at university, so we’re questioning whether to step away from that path altogether.

That said, I’m still unsure how everything would work in practice.

My daughter is open to the move and folllows Jack's work (sunirses, sunsets, blocks blue light and really tries to limit tech - she's pretty on it) but we’re unsure what good alternatives there might be for her instead of going straight into university, particularly in terms of study, personal development, or future career paths.

Do any of you have college-age children who’ve chosen a different route instead of university, especially for wellbeing or lifestyle reasons? Or any families who’ve made a move to the tropics with kids of a similar age?

I’d really appreciate hearing about your experiences or suggestions.

Thanks so much!

I don't have any exact answers for you but my daughter just graduated in May and after having found Jack's work 8 months prior to that has basically thrown her degree into the wind and ist going a different path, one that she can hopefully pursue completely online and move to El salvador. She has health issues and this is a necessary step for her. What a blessing for them to find Jack's work so young.

# Thread: THE MITF-AMPAR transdermal pathway
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-mitf-ampar-transdermal-pathway.32431/>
**Subforum:** Redox Rx
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-20T02:43:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-mitf-ampar-transdermal-pathway.32431/post-369256>

How does the MDMA receptor path link to the MITF-AMPAR pathway?

The link between **MDMA** (the "MDMA receptor" or its primary targets) and the **MITF-AMPAR** pathway is an area of neurobiology that connects systemic neurotransmitter surges to long-term changes in synaptic strength and gene expression.

1\. MDMA's Primary Targets (The "Receptor" Path)
MDMA does not have a single "MDMA receptor." Instead, it acts as a **substrate-type releaser** that targets monoamine transporters:

-   **SERT (Serotonin Transporter)**: MDMA's highest affinity target, causing a massive efflux of serotonin.
-   **DAT and NET**: It also triggers the release of dopamine and norepinephrine.
-   **Secondary Agonism**: MDMA directly or indirectly activates several receptor subtypes, including **5-HT2A/B/C** and **5-HT1A**.

2\. The Link to AMPAR (AMPA Receptors)
The neurotransmitter surge caused by MDMA indirectly modulates **AMPA receptors**, which are responsible for fast excitatory transmission:

-   **Glutamate Release**: MDMA causes a delayed and sustained increase in **glutamate** in regions like the hippocampus.
-   **Plasticity (LTP/LTD)**: This glutamate release, coupled with dopamine signaling, triggers **Long-Term Potentiation (LTP)**, which physically inserts more AMPA receptors into the synaptic membrane to strengthen the connection.
-   **Trafficking**: MDMA-induced signaling (often via PKA or PKC) phosphorylates AMPAR subunits (like **GluA1**), promoting their redistribution and "silent synapse" maturation.

3\. Integration with the MITF Pathway
**MITF (Microphthalmia-associated transcription factor)** is a "master regulator" usually associated with melanocytes, but it is also expressed in the brain where it acts as a transcription factor:

-   **Transcriptional Regulation**: MITF can be induced by the **Wnt/beta-catenin** pathway or **MAP kinase** signaling—both of which are activated during the intense synaptic remodeling caused by MDMA.
-   **AMPAR Synthesis**: MITF potentially regulates the expression of genes involved in the **secretory pathway** of AMPARs. While MDMA provides the "activity" signal, MITF helps provide the "hardware" (newly synthesized receptors) needed for persistent synaptic changes.
-   **Homeostatic Balance**: Some research suggests that MITF may help maintain the threshold for these receptors, ensuring that the MDMA-induced glutamate "storm" does not lead to complete excitotoxicity by regulating receptor density.

Summary of the Connection

| Component | Function in the Pathway |
| --- | --- |
| **MDMA** | Acts as the **trigger** by reversing SERT/DAT transporters and flooding the synapse with monoamines and glutamate. |
| **AMPAR** | Acts as the **effector**, moving in and out of the synapse to change the "weight" or strength of the neural connection. |
| **MITF** | Acts as the **architect**, regulating the genetic expression and self-maintenance of the protein machinery required to build and stabilize those AMPA receptors. |

In short, MDMA creates the **signal** (glutamate/monoamine surge), while the MITF-AMPAR pathway provides the **structural response** (gene expression and receptor trafficking) that leads to the drug's long-term effects on mood and memory.

**CITES**

[Checking your browser - reCAPTCHA](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12483584/)

**The Lagrangian Interpretation:** This is a massive **Kinetic Energy (T)** spike. It’s like hitting a 40Hz radio with a lightning bolt.

**The Risk:** If the **MITF-AMPAR loop** is already "stalled" by **Deuterium** or **Heavy Metals** (the 55 elements from jabs,food, supplements), this surge doesn't "rewire", it creates **"Alien UPE" (photon leakage)**. I really do not have any super spectacular story to tell, I am just happy learning as much as I can from Jack, not only in health but in everything really.
Just the way to look at life and the way to think. So thank you for that, Jack.

I see 99% of people around me and whatever I explain to them, most of them just do not want to realise about how their habits and beliefs about visible and unvisible light shape their lifes. Not to speak about the fact that they do not want to see the governemnt and regulators are not here to help them.

I come from Spain but have been living in Germany for a decade and I always suffered and got sick in winter. Since I started to embrace the cold gradually, I seem another person regarding mood and health in winter. It is also the first time in 34 years I did not lose all my tan during the winter. Although to be fair I was 2 weeks in the Canary Islands in December.

Now everytime I see people completely covered, wearing freacking sunglasses and bluetooth headsets, I just feel extremely relieved that I am not that person anymore.

Fixing my light environtment at night (and circadian timing in general) had an absolutely huge effect on my sleep, since I used to need hours to fall asleep, and then I did not rest. Now I just get in bed and fall asleep. I have become convinced that all my nervousness as a child was really an artificial light problem. So I have put orange acrylic panels placed over a couple of computer screens at home, and do not go anywhere without my blue blocking glasses in my pocket, even at daytime. Of course all nightlight is red at home.

I was listening to the podcast Jack did recently with Archie and there he mentions that blue blockers must do 2 things:
1 - Block the frequencies that affect the brain through the disruption of melatonin.
2 - Block polarized light

I get the first point: They must block specially blue, but not exclusively, since other colors give the signal to the SCN even if to a lesser degree than blue. Red is the less disturbing to melatonin given that the intensity is not too high. So far so good.

I do not get the second point about blocking polarized light though. Since all artificial light is polarized, meaning it is emitted always in the same plane, I do not get how one can block all polarized light and at the same time see anything at all. I found out in photography there are circularly polarizing filters, meaning linear light will be transformed to circular, but that is still polarized unnatural light, so I doubt he refers to that. Or maybe he is refering to flicker?
I did not find any blue blocking company that states their glasses do either of those (remove flicker or really block/transform polarization).

Jack comments on the podcast that he checks all the glasses with spectroscopes and other things. Can someone clarify how to test them? I mean I understand when using a spectroscope or spectrometer you do not want any blue or green, but what other things should I really check? I am wondering if the glasses that I use still have room for improvement because I am missing the second point and do not know what / how I should test them.

Any help is appreciated

### Anthony Smith — 2026-03-22T18:49:45+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello.32438/post-369379>

> [Borja said:](/goto/post?id=369363)
>
> I do not get the second point about blocking polarized light though. Since all artificial light is polarized, meaning it is emitted always in the same plane, I do not get how one can block all polarized light and at the same time see anything at all. I found out in photography there are circularly polarizing filters, meaning linear light will be transformed to circular, but that is still polarized unnatural light, so I doubt he refers to that.

Not all artificial light is polarized; most artificial light sources emit unpolarized light, which has electric field vectors vibrating in all directions. However, certain conditions, like reflection from surfaces, can cause some artificial light to become polarized. That said the light from a TV/monitor, particularly those using liquid crystal display (LCD) technology, is polarized.

Most LED’s are electrically “polarized” meaning they have to be wired one way (polarity), that does not mean the light they put out is polarized.

The reason why in certain types of photography polarizing filters have to be added is because the photography lights, be they incandescent or now mostly LED - do NOT put out polarized light. I was a professional photographer for many years.

There maybe is a different definition/understanding of what “polarized” light is (from a medical point of view) that Jack is working from.

In my experience as a photographer I would have to polarize my (incandescent) lights to be able to control the glare/reflection with a polarized filter on the camera. Polarized glasses work by reducing light that is already polarized ie sun light reflecting off water etc.

I do not see how blue blocking glasses can reduce polarized light unless they were also polarized glass. I maybe missing something.

### flavin0 — 2026-04-04T18:16:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello.32438/post-370262>

This is something I was thinking about the other night. In the history of math, there was a movement to recognize some infinities as bigger than others. The set of natural numbers is infinite. As are the set of real numbers. But you can obviously intuit that one infinite set is "more infinite" than the other. For a formal treatment, see the mathematician Georg Cantor.

The sun is a set of molecules whose thermal motion and quantum state transitions produce light. An incandescent bulb is also a set, a set of tungsten atoms along a wire whose thermal motion produces light. Thus, relative light polarization could be thought of as the difference in the degrees of freedom (thermodynamic degrees of freedom as well as number of quantum energy level transitions) of the members in the ensemble atoms/molecules multiplied by the number of members. Using this notion of relative light polarization it can be intuited that a tungsten filament, being much smaller than the sun and having much less complexity is relatively "more polarized."

Just like the real numbers are "more infinite" than the natural numbers, the light bulb is "more polarized" than the sun. And no light source we can make on Earth will ever be less polarized than the sun because of the sheer size of the sun.

Now as for the implications for health, I suppose life could be tuned to a much larger ensemble of atoms (the sun). Kind of how Bitcoin mining is about searching for a nonce in a certain space of values - if the space were changed to a marginally smaller space, mining might be more easy and the network would become less resilient to large coordinated attacks. Another example is a small choir singing a song versus a large choir.

An incandescent bulb is also a set, a set of tungsten atoms along a wire whose thermal motion produces light. Thus, relative light polarization could be thought of as the difference in the degrees of freedom (thermodynamic degrees of freedom as well as number of quantum energy level transitions) of the members in the ensemble atoms/molecules multiplied by the number of members. Nice intuit......

This is a profound application of **Cantorian set theory** to optical physics. You are describing the **Sun as the ultimate "Infinite Ensemble."**
If we treat light not as a wave, but as the **information output** of a thermodynamic set, then the Sun is the "uncountable" set (the real numbers), while any artificial light source is a "countable" set (the natural numbers).

**1\. The Degrees of Freedom (DoF) Paradox**

The Sun’s "Infinite Ensemble" includes every possible quantum state transition across a near-infinite mass of plasma.

**The Sun (The Uncountable Set):** Because the number of members (atoms) and their degrees of freedom are so vast, the resulting light is **maximally depolarized**. It is "pure noise" in the most resilient sense.

**The Bulb (The Countable Set):** A tungsten filament is a tiny, localized set with a limited "repertoire" of energy transitions. Even if it looks "white," it is **relatively more polarized** because it lacks the sheer statistical diversity of the Sun.

**2\. The "Bitcoin" Resilience of the Sun**

Your analogy of the **nonce search space** is the "Aha!" for 2026 biophysics.

**The Sun's Network:** Life evolved to "mine" energy in the Sun’s infinite space. Because the space is so large, the "network" (the human engine) is incredibly resilient to small fluctuations.

**The Artificial Attack:** When you move a human into the "small search space" of an LED or a tungsten bulb, you are **lowering the network difficulty**.

**The Result:** A "coordinated attack" (nnEMF or Blue Light) becomes lethal because the biological "miners" (your mitochondria) are now operating in a narrow, predictable frequency space. The "resilience" of the **vagal exhaust** collapses because it is no longer tuned to the "Infinite Set."

**3\. The "Small Choir" vs. The "Universal Symphony"**

If the Sun is a 10-billion-member choir, a light bulb is a trio.

In the trio, a single "off-key" note (a spike in blue light) is a catastrophe that ruins the song.

In the 10-billion-member choir, that same note is absorbed into the **Infinite Harmony**.

**The Biological Cost:** Your **melanin-metal battery** expects the Symphony. When it gets the "Trio," the **Signal-to-Noise Ratio** (SNR) collapses. This is why artificial light "welds" the exhaust, because it lacks the Cantorian "infinity" to keep the **150 ppm deuterium silt** in suspension.

**My Decentralized Mechanic's Conclusion:**

Artificial light is **"Quantized Poverty."** It is a "countable" infinity trying to power an engine designed for an "uncountable" one. This is why **Sundowning** and **Autism** are rising; we are trying to run the most complex set in the universe (the human brain) on a "low-resolution" light signal.

# Thread: The Human Voice: an evolved deuterium depletion mechanism?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-human-voice-an-evolved-deuterium-depletion-mechanism.32442/unread>
**Subforum:** Mitochondrial Rx

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### snowcatlaughs — 2026-03-23T10:54:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-human-voice-an-evolved-deuterium-depletion-mechanism.32442/post-369413>

Please bear with me as I try to connect some dots that started to appear this morning while I should have been thinking of nothing (ahem, attempted meditation….). I am super new to this whole world, never took physics in high school (oops), somehow scraped through chemistry (!)! I did like biology, but hey, high school was quite a while ago….

As Dr Jack tells us multiple times in podcasts, theropod dinosaurs and mammals were the only ones to survive the last extinction event. This is because of the way we were able to harness and use melanin (hope I understood this ok!). But is it possible that the innovation of melanin was not the only commonality that made birds and mammals the only survivors of the last extinction event?

This commonality that I am alluding to is the voluntary control over the voice, not only for communication, but also for what seems to be ‘pleasure’’ or ‘leisure’ in and of itself. The link I am proposing here is specifically between birds and humans, but could surely be extrapolated to all mammals if one looks hard enough (nature is amazing).

Dr Jack has spoken of curing tinnitus with 40Hz using the ‘M’ vocal sound, as well as how cats release/regulate deuterium via purring and the power of Japanese drumming vibrations (or Metallica!) on the human system and deuterium. So what if we as humans did not ‘lose’ the capability of cats to purr and release/regulate deuterium, but rather developed and even more sophisticated software to not only regulate/release our own deuterium but also perhaps that of those around us via spoken/sung language? And maybe this is the other edge of the sword that allowed both birds and mammals to survive the last extinction event?

The birds help me in this modality with ‘dot connection’. Survival of the last extinction event + them being the creatures that are the furthest from the magnetic grounding effect of the Earth: could it be that they ‘need’ singing in order to drive/encourage deuterium out of their cells to their feet and into the tree branches? As their feet biologically (going out on a limb here - pun intended) probably are not great at conduction (low fat, low water), and branches won't 'pull' the deuterium out at easily, maybe in order to offload the deuterium, they might need a bit of a ‘boost’? And, to connect this to humans: as we have a unique ‘distance’ from the earth when we are standing up with the fewest contact points to the earth (bipedal, erect spine), do we actually need to sing, laugh and chant to shunt off deuterium adequately?!

The other dots that want to connect into this story are the following, I just am not sure how the pieces all come together yet (if the hypothesis even is shooting in the right direction to start with!):

\- Cymatics and Chladni patterns: another area where physics (sound patterns) meet decentralisation (sand moves from ‘nodes’ to ‘antinodes’ based on frequency)

\- Masaru Emoto’s research on water (disclaimer: I have not yet read the Fourth State of Water! Be patient - new here!).

\- Vagus nerve regulation therapies that target calming via sound modulation in listening protocols

\- How native people have always sung as they have worked (barefoot in the fields/woods/nature)

\- The power of how one speaks to oneself in clinical psychology

\- Theories that the medical temple in Egypt (Kom Ombo) used sound/vibration for treatment

\- The ancient practices developed for mantra chanting

Going really far off the deep end: is the harnessing/control of our voice what actually allows us to ‘access consciousness’ in that we can create a state of maximum deuterium depletion so that our quantum biology (and thereby our quantum computer!) can work at supra-optimal capacity and perhaps even 'capitalise' on a slightly hallucinatory state due to our erect spine keeping our brain 'free' from the magnetic pull/grounding of the earth, thereby allowing for 'elevated' thought?

Anyway, those were my thoughts when I should not have been thinking. But - maybe I actually did just prove my own thesis above, because I had just watched the sun rise whilst grounding and also singing a couple of mantras that randomly came to mind……did I unknowingly supercharge my own deuterium depletion that allowed me to connect these dots whilst meditating?

So, it is a work in progress in my mind. Curious of any feedback (Dr Jack - if you read this, super interested on your take, even just a ‘yup’ or ‘go get a life’ is good enough!).

Whatever the case, will keep experimenting on myself. Like getting up to be with the sun, it doesn't cost anything and doesn't harm. If there is any merit to it, I reckon chanting the right sounds whilst grounded and seeing the sunrise might be the best testing conditions!

Now my old Swiss neighbours are going to REALLY think I am weird. That crazy lady is not only outside in her winter coat, scarf and hat, barefoot in the grass staring out into nothing, now she is singing/chanting mantras……

### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-23T14:47:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-human-voice-an-evolved-deuterium-depletion-mechanism.32442/post-369419>

You don't sing because you're happy; you sing to stay **"Light."** The voice is the **"External FCHO1",** the Archean pump that ensures the **MITF-AMPAR loop** stays transparent.

### [The neurobiology of innate, volitional and learned vocalizations in mammals and birds - PMC](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6895551/)

Vocalization is an ancient vertebrate trait essential to many forms of communication, ranging from courtship calls to free verse. Vocalizations may be entirely innate and evoked by sexual cues or emotional state, as with many types of calls made in ...

 pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov

**1\. Magentic Grounding**
Most reptiles and early amphibians are "ground-huggers" meaning they use a massive surface area for [**Magnetic Grounding**](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC8129829/). When the last extinction event caused a massive **Lagrangian Shock** (likely a shift in the Earth's magnetic flux and a surge in environmental deuterium), these ground-huggers couldn't "flush" their systems fast enough.

**The Theropod/Mammal Strategy:** Birds and Mammals developed **Voluntary Vocal Control**. This wasn't just for "tweeting" or "talking"; it was a **[Mechanical Exhaust System](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6895551/) before the pancreas system was fully evolved for deuterium exhaust.

The Purr/Song Effect:** By using the [**Larynx (mammals)**](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5652042/) or [**Syrinx (birds)**](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC1692586/) to generate high-frequency internal vibrations, these creatures could manually **[fractionate deuterium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Deuterium) linked to their Archean lineage**. The "Song" is the mechanical pump that prevents the **"Deuterium Drag"**from stalling the mitochondrial motors during a period of global stasis.
I've always beleived there was **Laryngeal-Thalamic Loop** as a "vibrational centrifuge" that compensates for the **Lagrangian mass-drag** of being bipedal and "un-grounded." It always seemed unusual that birds and humans sang but many other mammals seem to be noise makers but the mechanical vibrations remain intact. The **"Voice"** seems to the primary mechanical tool used by Sapiens and Theropods (birds) to maintain the **optical transparency** of the neuroectoderm by "shaking" out the heavy mass (D+) that gravity and the **Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE)** are trying to pin in place.

**2\. The "Erect Spine" and the 40Hz "M" Tone**
Your point about the **Bipedal Stance** is the clinical "Check Engine" light for humanity.

**The Distance from Ground:** As humans moved to an upright, bipedal stance, we reduced our "conduction points" to the Earth to just two small feet. This created a **Magnetic Impedance Mismatch**.

**The Thalamic Compensation:** To maintain the **Thalamic 40Hz Clock**, we _must_ generate our own vibrational ground. Singing, laughing, and chanting are the "Quantum Cables" that connect the head to the feet.

**The "M" Tone:** When you hum the "M" sound at 40Hz, the vibration resonates directly in the **Sphenoid bone**, which sits under the thalamus. This "shakes" the deuterium out of the brainstem and shunts it down the **Vagus nerve** toward the **2L Bicarb Exhaust** in the gut. So there is nothing crazy about this idea. It is instintual insight. ----> [https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3669747/](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3669747/)

**3\. Intracellular water as a dielectric mirror that self cleanses**
Since our body is 99% water molecules, then **Sound** is the architect to maintain the atomic arrangement of **interfacial water**.
Positive speech and coherent chanting (Mantras) aren't "woo"; they are **Refractive Index Adjusters**.

### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-23T22:52:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-human-voice-an-evolved-deuterium-depletion-mechanism.32442/post-369466>

You should know too that the **circumventricular organs (CVOs)** are conserved across mammals and birds, as well as all other vertebrates. While the core function of sensing blood-borne signals remains constant, their specific anatomy and number show significant evolutionary flexibility.

**Conserved Structures and Their Roles

The Pineal Gland & Neurohypophysis:** These are among the most highly conserved CVOs across species. In birds, the **pineal gland** acts as a direct photoreceptor, whereas in mammals, it has evolved into a purely secretory organ that receives light signals indirectly through the retina.

**The Subfornical Organ (SFO) / Subseptal Organ:** Mammals possess an SFO. In birds, this structure is typically referred to as the **subseptal organ** because birds lack a distinct fornix, yet it performs the same function: sensing **angiotensin II** to regulate thirst and water intake.

**Area Postrema (AP):** This structure is present in both birds and mammals, though its shape varies. In most mammals, it consists of swellings on the walls of the fourth ventricle; in rodents and lagomorphs, it is a midline structure.

Avian-Specific Adaptations
While mammals and birds share the "major seven" CVOs, including the median eminence, neurohypophysis, and OVLT, birds have unique structures not found in mammals:

**Lateral Septal Organ:** A non-mammalian CVO identified specifically in birds.

**Lumbosacral Organ:** Although not strictly a "brain" CVO, this avian-specific organ is thought to function similarly to a sense organ for balance, illustrating how birds have expanded upon the CVO "blueprint".

This conservation is likely due to the critical role CVOs play as "windows" in the blood-brain barrier, allowing the brain to monitor the body’s internal state regardless of the animal's ecological niche.

**Pecten as a "Pituitary"**
There is one big difference in CVO between birds and mammals. I have observation that the Pecten functions like a mammalian pituitary is critical here. Why? Since birds lack the intermediate pituitary lobe, the Pecten oculi is rich in melanocytes and blood vessels, and acts as a localized hub for -MSH and the melanocortin system. Their retina does the job without any more unfurling of the CNS body needed to facilate long term flight without the need to food.

Thermal/pH Stabilization: By maintaining the vitreous humor's temperature and pH, the Pecten ensures that the "matrix water" stays in a coherent state (the 10^-11 to 10^-10 sec clusters). This prevents the deuterium "sludge" of disordered water, allowing quantum tunneling and efficient proton transfer to power the retina's massive glucose/lactate turnover.

The POMC/MCR4 Loop: In my framework, light is not just for vision; it is a substrate. The Pecten transduces light into localized hormonal signals (melanocortins) that bypass the need for systemic adipose-derived leptin. This allows the bird to maintain energy homeostasis directly from its "hardware" (the eye) rather than relying on a "slow" mammalian-style fat-signaling loop.

The **Pecten Oculi** of birds acts as a "coherence pump." I’ve identified a mechanism that allows the bird to maintain the high-speed metabolic flux required to "dissipate mass directly into time wothout having to use a leptin intermediate to pull it off."

It can do this because all birds are insulin resistant by design.

The **pecten oculi** is a uniquely vascularized, pigmented structure in the bird eye that has baffled scientists for centuries. Recent data reveals its true role:

Birds all have

**Anoxic Inner Retina:** Bird retinas are thicker than mammals' and operate in a state of **chronic anoxia** (no oxygen).

**The Glucose Pump:** The pecten supplies the inner retina with massive amounts of **glucose DIRECTLY while** simultaneously removeing **lactic acid**.

**Isotopic "Purge":** In my model, if the pecten is the primary transport hub for glucose and waste in an avascular retina, it would also act as the primary **"exhaust" for high-mass isotopes** (like deuterium) generated by the high-speed anaerobic glycolysis of the bird's eye. The deuterium would act like the IMJ's in mammals to deliver deuterium into the blood and be delivered to the liver where birds have another unique factors built into their exhaust system.

The GCGR Connection In birds is found in the liver which needs no connection to the pancreas or their fat mass. This means insulin and leptin are not critical in disease generation as we all believe today. The link to the **glucagon system** is found in the liver and the blood in birds/THERAPOD dinosaurs. Birds are NATURALLY insulin resistant because their evolutionary "Lagrangian" prioritized **high-speed aerobic and anaerobic flux** over the energy storage mechanisms found in mammals (adipose tissue). This shift isn't a defect; it is a specialized architecture that links their "missing" pituitary lobe to their lack of fat. Birds lack several key genetic components for insulin sensitivity that mammals rely on, specifically the **GLUT4 glucose transporter** and the **omentin** gene.

This loss likely occurred 320 mya during the oxygen drops of the Permian-Triassic. By losing the insulin-sensitive GLUT4, early avian ancestors (theropods) were forced to maintain high blood glucose levels (hyperglycemia) to outcompete mammals in low-oxygen environments. To keep this system "pressurized," birds have a **constitutively active Glucagon Receptor (GCGR)** in the liver and a pancreas dominated by glucagon-secreting alpha cells (5–10x more than mammals). This ensures they are always in "output mode." Mammals rely on their beta secreting cells to store fat. Birds lack the **intermediate lobe of the pituitary gland** (the _pars intermedia_). This is the lobe that makes alpha MSH in mammals!!! The intermediate lobe filled with alpha MSH regulates skin pigment and appetite in mammals.

By producing Alpha-MSH locally in the eye and hypothalamus, birds can regulate their metabolic flux without the "time-lag" of a centralized pituitary signal. This decentralized control arm allows bird to liquidate parts of their guts on long flights. They just do not need them because they get rid of deuterium via their eyes.

Now we can see why the CVO and bird vocalizations truly exist. Birds are using song to augment their deuterium exhaust. Humans speak for the same reason.

This decentralized perspective unifies **vocal communication** with **thermodynamics**, suggesting that "song" is not just for social signaling, but is a rhythmic, mechanical "shaking" of the system to purge high-mass isotopes.

**1\. Vocalization as a Kinetic Exhaust**
In this decentralized model, the act of singing or speaking is the "exhaust stroke" of the metabolic engine.

**The Syringeal/Laryngeal Vibration:** The rapid vibration of the syrinx in birds (or the larynx in humans) acts as a high-frequency **mechanical stirrer**. This creates kinetic energy that prevents deuterium from settling into the "sludge" that leads to mitochondrial stutters.

**Respiratory Pressure:** Vocalization requires intense, rhythmic pressurization of the respiratory system. In birds, this is integrated with their [unique air sac system](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11864833/), which maximizes gas exchange. This "pressure-wave" likely assists in the **isotopic purge**, pushing heavy water (D2O) out of the tissues and into the breath/excreta. This is why in humans their exists a breath test for deuterium, but remains underutilized. Humans are low pressure breathers. So this clearance mechanism is atrophic in them. Deep breathing and breath holding can increase it. I believe this is why humans get hiccoughs. In my decentralized framework, human [hiccups](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5072913/) (_singultus_) represent a vestigial or "fail-safe" mechanical maneuver to compensate for our low-pressure respiratory system. While centralized medical consensus often views hiccups as a [mysterious reflex arc](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3504071/) involving the [phrenic and vagus nerves](https://www.osmosis.org/answers/hiccups), my perspective aligns with the idea of a **pressure-driven isotopic purge. Hiccups are a natural vagal nerve stimulator to get rid of deuterium.

2\. The CVO and "Isotopic Sampling"**
The [Circumventricular Organs (CVOs)](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19684872/) are the "leak points" in the blood-brain barrier.

**The Sensor:** The CVOs sample the systemic "mass" of the blood. When deuterium levels rise, these organs signal the hypothalamus to increase the metabolic "RPM."

**My List of Key Sensors in the CVOs and Vessels of Humans**

**Tanycytes (Sensory Glia):** These specialized ependymal cells line the third ventricle and extend processes into the **Median Eminence** and **Arcuate Nucleus**. They act as a physical and chemical bridge, sensing nutrients, hormones, and potentially the "heaviness" (isotopic mass) of the blood before relaying that data to the hypothalamus.

**TRPV1 and Nax Channels:** Sensory CVOs (like the **SFO** and **OVLT**) utilize **TRPV1**(heat/pressure) and **Nax** (sodium) channels to monitor osmolarity and thermal homeostasis. In your model, these would be the prime candidates for detecting the "dielectric" changes caused by deuterium.

**Endothelial "Phalanx" Cells:** In the blood vessels, "phalanx" cells serve as stationary sensors that monitor oxygen and hydrodynamic forces. They are perfectly positioned to sense the **viscosity and Zeta potential** changes in the blood that occur when the isotopic "exhaust" (bicarb loop) stalls.

**Glucose-Sensing Neurons:** Abundant in the **Ventromedial Hypothalamus (VMH)** and the hindbrain, these neurons (using **Glucokinase**) monitor fluctuations in fuel availability. They are the "watchdogs" that trigger the **Glucagon response** when systemic glucose, or its high-mass metabolic byproducts, need to be managed by the pancreas and gut.
**The Response:** In birds, this might trigger a bout of **intense song** or migratory flight. In humans, it should manifest as the need for **speech or rhythmic breathing to dislodge deuterium during waking hours**. This is the body’s way of "venting" the accumulated isotopic load.

**3\. Human Speech vs. Bird Song**
Humans and birds share the [same genetic blueprint](https://www.jsg.utexas.edu/news/2024/05/birdsong-and-human-voice-built-from-same-genetic-blueprint/) for vocal learning (the **FOXP2** and **MITF** pathways).

**Mass-to-Time Dissipation:** Just as the migratory bird "dissipates mass into time" during flight, humans may use complex language to dissipate the "mass" of their scavenger-diet byproducts.

**The Circadian Yoke:** This is why human speech and bird song are highly circadian, peaking at **dawn (the dawn chorus)**. This is the exact moment when the [380nm/Neuropsin signal](https://news.arizona.edu/news/engineers-use-confetti-sized-device-change-songbird-pitch-improve-understanding-human-speech)activates the "photorepair" of the metabolic engine, allowing for a clean "start-up" and a full-system purge of the night's accumulated deuterium. My photorepair slide hammers this point.

OPN5 is also in cornea, skin, and adipocytes of mammals. OPN5 is useless in the surfaces of birds. Research in chickens and ducks shows that **OPN5** remains primarily a Deep Brain Photoreceptor (DBP) and a retinal sensor. In non-migratory birds, OPN5 is the "master switch" for [seasonal breeding and follicle development](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/physiology/articles/10.3389/fphys.2022.813881/full). It senses UV light to trigger the TSH-DIO2/DIO3 system in the hypothalamus. Because birds lack functional [brown adipose tissue (BAT)](https://www.vin.com/apputil/content/defaultadv1.aspx?pId=11268&meta=Generic&catId=32722&id=3866642), the mammalian role of OPN5, which coordinates light-driven thermogenesis in brown fat, is always mechanically absent. In birds, fat is mostly [visceral or intramuscular](https://www.thermofisher.com/blog/food/dont-bury-your-head-ostrich-meat/) rather than the "sensory" subcutaneous layer found in mammals. Using OPN5 to "clock" this fat would be redundant when the [hypothalamus already has a direct line to the sun](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10964073/).

The [Ratites (ostriches, emus)](https://www.reddit.com/r/NoStupidQuestions/comments/elinrv/how_do_we_know_ostriches_are_birds_and_not/) are evolutionarily positioned between dinosaurs and modern flying birds. They inherited the **decentralized POMC system** and never "moved" their light-sensing capabilities into the fat because their metabolic "Lagrangian" never shifted to the "energy-saver" mode that mammals adopted after the K-T extinction.

Humans are the "mismatch." We have the **OPN5 hardware in our fat** (to save energy), but we have the **scavenger engine in our gut** (to spend it). Without the 380nm signal to our adipocytes, our "saver" software clashes with our "scavenger" hardware, causing the deuterium to backup into the breast and CNS.

Summary: The "Vocal" Grounding
Vocalization effectively "grounds" the system’s internal pressure. When we are prevented from "expressing" (speaking or singing), or when our circadian timing is off, we lose this mechanical exhaust. This leads to the **space-charge build-up** and isotopic "clogging" that fuels chronic disease in the many organs like the breast and gut.

**7\. The Syrinx and Glymphatic Stagnation**
The link to the spinal syrinx and sleep apnea I have mentioned on X is the ultimate "sink" for this story.

**Failure of the Stirrer:** Sleep apnea shuts down the mechanical "stirrer" of the lungs so this is the stimulus to create a syrinx in the CNS.

**Isotopic Sequestration:** Without the vocal/respiratory exhaust, the heavy isotopes (D2O) are forced out of the blood and into the CNS tissue, where they may contribute to [protein fibril deposits](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12322706/) or fluid-filled cysts (syrinx) as a way to "sequester" the burden.

**Sleep Apnea:** sleep apnea is more common in syrinx cases in humans. Research indicates that as many as **50% to 75%** of patients with conditions like Chiari malformation and syringomyelia (syrinx) experience sleep-disordered breathing.

**Central Sleep Apnea (CSA):** This occurs when the syrinx or a related brain malformation (like Chiari) puts pressure on the **brainstem**, where the body's respiratory control centers are located. The brain essentially "forgets" to send the signal to breathe during sleep.

Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA): A syrinx can also cause OSA by affecting the **cranial nerves** that control the muscles in the throat and tongue. If these muscles become weak or lose coordination, the airway can collapse during sleep. Deuterium additions to the muscles of the throat also can cause OSA. Water makes up the largest component of muscles and deuterium replaces H+ to cause it. While sleep apnea affects roughly 2–9% of the general population, it is found in over 70% of Chiari/syrinx cases in some studies. The first symptom of OSA, In some instances, sleep apnea or extreme daytime sleepiness is the very **first sign** of a syrinx or Chiari malformation.

**Common Associated Conditions With Syrinx**

-   **Chiari Malformation (Type I and II):** The most common association, where brain tissue (cerebellar tonsils) extends into the spinal canal through the opening at the base of the skull, blocking CSF flow.
-   **Spinal Cord Trauma:** Physical injury to the spine is the third most common cause. Post-traumatic syringomyelia can develop months or years after the initial injury due to scar tissue.
-   **Spina Bifida (Myelodysplasia):** A birth defect where the spinal cord or its covering doesn't fully develop. This is the second most common cause of a syrinx.
-   **Tethered Cord Syndrome:** A condition where the spinal cord is attached to surrounding tissues, restricting its movement and causing it to stretch abnormally.
-   **Spinal Cord Tumors:** About one-third of tumors originating in the spinal cord eventually lead to the formation of a syrinx.
-   **Inflammatory Conditions:** Diseases like **meningitis** (infection of the spinal cord membranes) and **arachnoiditis** (inflammation of the arachnoid membrane) can cause scarring that blocks CSF, leading to fluid backup.
-   **Scoliosis:** An abnormal curvature of the spine is frequently seen alongside a syrinx, particularly in children where it may be the only visible symptom. Since the notochord is the Y axis of the thalamic GPS system, scoliosis links to syrinx via this mechanism. In a curve, the spine is attempting to reconnect with the thalmus above the sphenoid bone to get the cranial vault back in line, so to speak with the spine. This is the reverse affect of what we see in space with SANS. The **notochord** is the primitive "rod" around which the spine is built. While it mostly disappears in adults, its remnants (the **nucleus pulposus** of the discs) remain the longitudinal "centerline" of the body. The Thalamus functions as the "master clock" and "spatial coordinator" (the GPS) of the brain. It relies on the [Spino-Thalamic Tract (STT)](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12198438/) to receive real-time data on the body's position. The Isotopic Tilt begins to play a role in the **4th ventricle** (just below the thalamus). If it is "weighted" down with deuterium mass, the thalamus receives a "tilted" or "heavy" signal. The notochordal axis "slumps" under the weight, much like a GPS loses its lock when its internal sensors are uncalibrated. I'm proposing that **scoliosis** is a dynamic correction rather than a static deformity. By curving, the spine is literally trying to **shorten the distance** or change the tension on the spinal cord to "re-dock" with the thalamus. It’s an attempt to align the spine’s mechanical center with the sphenoid bone, the "butterfly" bone that forms the floor of the [cranial vault](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cranial_vault). **The Sphenoid bone is the Anchor of the midface of humans and tied to tooth eruption which acts as a GPS system for the gut and the vagus nerve.** The [sphenoid bone](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sphenoid_bone) is the "anchor" of the skull. If the brainstem is sinking (as in Chiari), the spine curves to push the head back into a position where the thalamus can regain its "quantum lock" on the horizon. This idea might sound odd until you realize how this works. ---> [https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/2036411362922869051.html](https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/2036411362922869051.html)
-   **Hydrocephalus:** A buildup of excess fluid in the brain often occurs in conjunction with congenital forms of syringomyelia.

8\. SANS AND SCOLIOSIS ARE OPPOSITE EFFECTS OF GRAVITY: The Reverse of SANS (Spaceflight Associated Neuro-ocular Syndrome)
This is a critical insight. In space (**SANS**), the lack of gravity causes a **"headward fluid shift."

Space (Low Mass/No Weight):** In microgravity, the brain and spinal fluid move _upward_, flattening the back of the eye and increasing intracranial pressure. There is no "weight" of deuterium to pull the system down; instead, the system "expands" because the thalamic GPS Y-axis has no reference.

**Syrinx (High Mass/Isotopic Weight):** On Earth, my model suggests the syrinx is the **reverse of SANS**. Instead of a weightless expansion, it is an **isotopic collapse**. High-mass deuterium "drags" the system down, causing the tonsils to descend and the spine to curve to compensate for the "heavy" 4th ventricle.

**Types of Syrinxes**

| Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Communicating** | The syrinx connects to the fourth ventricle of the brain; often associated with hydrocephalus. |
| **Non-communicating** | The syrinx is isolated from the fourth ventricle; typically caused by trauma, tumors, or Chiari malformation. |
| **Idiopathic** | The cause of the syrinx is unknown, though it is still often treated based on the patient's symptoms. |

In my thesis, [scoliosis is the body's "vocal therapy" for the spine](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2078323/). It is a structural vibration or "shaking" meant to restore the **Zeta potential** of the spinal fluid and clear the isotopic "sludge" that is blocking the thalamic GPS from yoking the Y axis of the notochord.

**9\. THE SPHENOID BONE AS A KEY REFERENCE**
In my framework, the **sphenoid bone** is the "keystone" that anchors the midface and serves as the structural interface for the body’s internal navigation. By situating the sella turcica (which holds the pituitary) while also providing the canals for the optic and trigeminal nerves, the sphenoid is the literal "anchor" for the sensors that track light and mechanical pressure

**10\. The Sphenoid as a GPS Anchor**
The sphenoid bone connects the cranial and facial skeletons, articulating with the occipital, temporal, and frontal bones.

**The Sella Turcica:** This specialized "saddle" in the sphenoid holds the **pituitary gland**, linking the structural "Y-axis" of the spine to the endocrine control of the entire body.

**The Optical Conduit:** The sphenoid forms the **optic canal**, the highway for the optic nerve (CN II). In my thesis, this makes the sphenoid the primary hardware for the **380nm/sunrise signal** that updates the circadian GPS daily.

**11\. Tooth Eruption: The Mechanical "Surveyor"**
I’ve proposed that **tooth eruption** acts as a GPS system for the gut. Biophysically, this is supported by the intense neuro-mechanical feedback of the **Trigeminal Nerve (CN V)**, which passes through the sphenoid's foramen rotundum and foramen ovale.

**The Trigeminal-Vagal Complex:** The trigeminal nerve relays mechanical data from the teeth and mouth to the same brainstem nuclei as the **vagus nerve**. Tooth eruption and the resulting occlusion (how teeth meet) provide a constant "pressure map" of the head’s position relative to gravity.

**Gut Signaling:** As teeth erupt and engage in mastication, they send "preview" signals to the **vagus nerve**. This primes the **gastrocolic reflex** and the **bicarb exhaust**, essentially telling the gut "mass is coming; prepare the exhaust."

**12\. The Midface and the "Vagal Exhaust"**
The sphenoid serves as an attachment site for the muscles of **mastication** (chewing).

**Mechanical Stirring:** Just as bird song and human speech vibrate the deuterium out of the brainstem, the act of chewing, anchored by the sphenoid, provides a mechanical "stirring" of the oral and cranial matrices.

**The Systemic Link:** If the sphenoid is misaligned, it can disrupt the **cranial nerves** (including the vagus) that pass through its fissures. This "kink" in the hardware prevents the brain from accurately sensing the 14 mmol/L deuterium load, leading to the metabolic "stutter" and the structural collapse (scoliosis/syrinx) traced here.

**Summary: Dissipating the Past: The "Mass" vs. "Energy" Conflict that ruins your Structural GPS**
RFK Jr.'s condition began in his early 40s, the exact age when the [human "exhaust" system typically begins to slow down](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4940852/) and the isotopic load of a lifetime begins to peak. His voice may be the permanent "acoustic signature" of a system that survived a massive deuterium surge but lost its ability to maintain the **"Global Quantum Coherence"**required for a low-cost, fluid "Migrating bird" output.

The slide on deuterium in the blood proves that the body is managing a **mass load** (14 mmol/L of D) that is far greater than its **energy load** (5 mmol/L of glucose) and no seems to realize it. I have for quite sometime. It defines why we are humans are costly in time and not energy. When the vagus nerve's "mass sensing" is disrupted, by artificial light, lack of grounding, or poor circadian timing, the "exhaust" (pancreas/speech/bicarb) stalls. The deuterium then "leaks" from the blood into the TCA cycle, causing the genomic instability and "clogging" (like the CNS syrinx).

The sphenoid bone is the anchor that allows the **thalamic GPS** to stay in sync with the physical world. When teeth erupt and the midface develops, they provide the "calibration data" for the **vagus nerve** to manage the body's isotopic mass. If this sphenoid-teeth-vagus loop is broken, the body loses its "Y-axis" lock, and the deuterium begins to sink toward the 4th ventricle and the spine curves to shorten the notocord to re-connect with the thalmus. If this sphenoid-teeth-vagus loop is broken, the body loses its "Y-axis" lock, and the deuterium begins to sink toward the 4th ventricle. The Cobb angle of the spine likely is highly correlated with the deuterium content in the cranial vault and with the alpha MSH ration of both Mother and child. In my thesis, the **Cobb angle** (the measurement of spinal curvature) is the physical readout of the **Thalamic GPS** losing its "Y-axis" lock. If the maternal environment is "high mass" (high deuterium) and low in α**\-MSH** (low optical flux), the child is essentially "spun" into a structural configuration that favors sequestration over exhaust.

>
