What do you understand the original apostolic, orthodox church to be today?

What did Christ say about the sacraments, the Eucharist?

The Holy Spirit descended on Jesus “like a dove”, on the 120 (men and women) in the upper room at Pentecost as tongues of fire. Later although the common way the Holy Spirit was received was by the laying on of hands, not exclusively. Some people just got the Holy Spirit when they accepted Jesus. Also the indication is anyone that has the Holy Spirit can lay hands on soeone else for both healing and receiving the Holy Spirit. Nowhere does it say it has to be a church leader/priest etc. That was added later by the church.

My point about meeting from house to house is that believers just got together and shared a meal, broke bread, took the Eucharist - no “priest” required. Jesus said where 2 or 3 are gathered in my name I will be in their midst Matt. 18:20. (In Jewish tradition it required 10 or more including a Rabbi to have a quorum) He also said in regard to the Eucharist I Cor. 11:25-26 - whenever you eat or drink “do this”. No where does it say the Eucharist has to be administered by a priest. That is another church tradition which was added later in history.

Women as priests . . . Oh boy!
A prominent woman in the New Testament who exemplifies leadership and being a teacher in the early church is Priscilla. Often mentioned alongside her husband, Aquila, Priscilla was a teacher and leader, noted for her theological acumen. In Acts 18, she and Aquila instruct Apollos, an eloquent preacher, in the way of God more accurately. Their partnership illustrates how women contributed to theological education and the spread of the Gospel message.

THEN there is Mary Magdalene who holds a particularly noteworthy position; she was not only one of Jesus' devoted followers but also the first to witness the resurrected Christ. In John 20:17-18, Jesus commissions her to tell the disciples about his resurrection, effectively making her the first apostle of the resurrection—a title that highlights her pivotal role in the foundational event of Christianity. Possibly the most important event in human history.

Remember the boys were just there and Jesus let them leave, He waited for her. The first act of the risen Christ (Last Adam) was to restore the woman to her rightful pace at the side of her ”Adam”. IF (since) in Christ there is no distinction between male and female how can it be wrong for a woman to be a teacher/priest. In fact 1 Peter 2:9 says ALL believer (including women) are priests “But you are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood . . . “

**Gal. 3:[26](https://biblehub.com/galatians/3-26.htm)\-27** You are all sons of God through faith in Christ Jesus. For all of you who were baptized into Christ have clothed yourselves with Christ. There is neither Jew nor Greek, slave nor free, **male nor female**, for you are all one in Christ Jesus. And if you belong to Christ, then you are Abraham’s seed and heirs according to the promise.

Time to decentralize your faith and understand the GOOD NEWS, read what the Bible says for yourself. Don’t believe the centralized/institutional lies.
The story of the Bible on one page:

> Here's some (ESV):

Eph. 5:25 . . . “As” (like) . . . Allegory
2 Cor. 11:2 . . . “As” (like) . . . Allegory
Rev. 19:7-9 . . . Specific - his bride . . . but not identified.
Rev> 21:9-10 . . . “Come I will show you the bride of the Lamb. And he carried me in spirit onto a great and high mountain, and showed me the great city, holy Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God”. - It then describes a physical city with gates and walls etc.

The only specific description of the bride is . . . New Jerusalem. NOT the church . . . Unless the church IS New Jerusalem.
Again another allegory - BUT IMO the body of Christ, ALL redeemed people, the church, in this context, IS New Jerusalem. The dwelling place of God. This a word to “Jewish” people, using THEIR language, that their old temple system (vicarious relationship with God) was/is being replaced by a direct personal relationship with HIs in dwelling presence. IICor. 6:16 “. . . For you are a temple of the living God . . .”

Also thnk about it . . . If we are the body of Christ . . . How can we also be the bride? Is He marrying Himself?
THEN . . . IF all believers are the bride . . . Who are the friends of the bridegroom (wedding party) AND who are the guests attending the wedding?
Could it be some believers are the Bride, while others are the wedding Party and others are the guests? Or is it all allegory?

The institutions of the Christian movement that the Jews established gave the Jews 100% monopolies on lending and international trade with non-Christian countries by completely outright banning Christians from engaging and by also allowing Jews to be the only non-Christians who were permitted to live amongst the whites in Europe. Jews, of course, were also universally educated, unlike over 99% of the Christian population, who were expressly forbidden from reading anything other than the Bible by the Christian institutions the Jews established in Europe, which from roughly 450 to 1350 represented the entire media and educational establishment and moral and cultural authority throughout the white world.

During the age of Christendom, life expectancy fell to about a quarter of its pre-Christian peak during classical Rome. Towards the end of the Christian reign of terror it got so bad that white people almost went extinct. They were forced to self-flagellate with whips for the amusement of the clergy (many of the most prominent of whom have been officially confirmed to have been practicing Jews using fake gentile names to pass as "Christians" – see the Pierleonis and the Borgias for prominent examples). The populations of many cities came to live exposed to the elements in the abandoned ruins of the sports stadiums built 1,000+ years earlier by the pagans, often the only buildings left standing after all that time because they were wider than they were tall. Nobody could build new dwellings, of course, because all white people were, effectively by force of Christian Canon law, illiterate, broke, and in perpetual medical distress.

Our salvation was actually the Black Plague, which killed half the white population. The surviving half was finally so shaken by the overt horrors around them that for the first time in a thousand years, they refused to follow orders from corpulent Jewish priests in bedazzled golden robes to remain docile and compliant and went looking for answers. Thus began the Renaissance, from which sprang the Reformation and the Enlightenment, which resurrected us from what had been quite a dire situation indeed under the Judeo-Christian racial caste theocracy of the Dark Ages.

### TB14 — 2026-05-01T23:42:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/know-your-religious-history-to-get-the-sides-right.32466/post-372772>

Religion in the supernatural sense we think of it today has nothing to do with Judaism. Judaism is avowedly naturalist. That's more or less the fundamental tenant from my reading of the Old Testament. It's a semantic issue in the translations (and a deliberate one at that). Judaism worships "that which is" as the supreme power. The invocations and screeds against superstition, idolatry, etc., and the attribution of so many of the evils that befall people to those sins is a warning not to put your faith in fairytales. The etymology of the words used in Hebrew is a major key. The translation is how they sell it. Paganism was based in fairytales, but they were meant to be read as parables, just like the modern Bible. They took that element of paganism and twisted it to convince the masses to believe fairytales with messages that would harm them, rather than help them. They took the originally benevolent institution of religion and flipped it on its head in the most successful and devastating psy op of all time.

I think religion in its right place is a great thing, actually. If it were up to me, I would dispense with Christianity on the grounds that it was designed from day 1 as a poison, and needs to be flipped completely on its head from its starting point in order to help people. That doesn't necessarily mean there isn't potential in it – particularly because of its intense staying power and the fervent belief of its followers – to inculcate good, or even that it hasn't inculcated any good in the past. In fact, I think the more intelligent and benevolent people of Christendom have been working to bend Christianity in the right direction for a very long time, and that it may have had a net positive influence on social direction in the 1600s, 1700s and 1800s. Still, it remained an instrument of oppression to the point of effectively slavery for an entire millennium preceding that era.

If we were to keep Christianity, or rather really reinstitute it, the Gospels would have to be rewritten. "Turn the other cheek" has got to go. Allowing somebody who wrongs you not only to get away with it but to do it again is not only destructive to yourself, but evil, actually. Which is the point. A people who live under a 'turn the other cheek' guiding philosophy will come to be ruled by the most evil, anti-social people among them. Whatever violent thug keeps the most people's bruised and battered cheeks on a swivel and derives the most benefit from so doing will be in charge of us all. Not surprisingly, society stops moving in the right direction when you apply intense selective pressure for evil in choosing the people who get to operate the levers.

> [Anthony Smith said:](/goto/post?id=372671)
>
> Zionism is a political movement that uses religion (Judaism) as a cover. It is questioned if most Zionist “Jews” are even physical descendants of Abraham but even Hasidic Jews say they are not Jewish (by faith). When your claim on the Land is you are ”God’s chosen people” and HE gave it to you BUT over 50% of the “Jewish” population is atheist - denying the very existence of that God . . . I would say you are thin ice.
>
> It is interesting to look at how Christianity and the Gospel message has been corrupted over the years and I guess it is interesting to figure out by whom. BUT the original gospel message is still there to be read both in the NT . . . and for those who claim the NT was “fixed”, you can find the whole thing in the Old Testament (OT) also.
>
> As I have said several times the context of any text is important . . .
> What if the whole of the NT including Revelation was written before 70 AD (the destruction of the temple)? There is a lot of evidence it was.
> 5x in Revelation it says “soon” or “shortly” (depending on translation) as a timeline for things to come to pass. What if 99% of it (Revelation) happened back then?
>
> Multiple times in the NT it talks about the coming of and indwelling of the Holy Spirit, providing a personal direct relationship with God, no intermediary needed. Fairly stupid to leave that in if you are trying to create a religious system totally dependent on you, just saying.

>
> Religion in the supernatural sense we think of it today has nothing to do with Judaism. Judaism is avowedly naturalist. That's more or less the fundamental tenant from my reading of the Old Testament. It's a semantic issue in the translations (and a deliberate one at that). Judaism worships "that which is" as the supreme power. The invocations and screeds against superstition, idolatry, etc., and the attribution of so many of the evils that befall people to those sins is a warning not to put your faith in fairytales. The etymology of the words used in Hebrew is a major key. The translation is how they sell it. Paganism was based in fairytales, but they were meant to be read as parables, just like the modern Bible. They took that element of paganism and twisted it to convince the masses to believe fairytales with messages that would harm them, rather than help them. They took the originally benevolent institution of religion and flipped it on its head in the most successful and devastating psy op of all time.

Changing the meaning of one word can change the meaning/understanding of everything.
YHVH - “Yahweh” based on the verb “to be”- it is the verb - to be - third person singular . . . He who is (be). NOT - “that” which is.

What Abraham and Moses offered is a vast improvement on everything else that existed at the time.
All the surrounding peoples were polytheistic. They sacrificed their children to Moloch.

Now what the priests did with the teachings of Moses, especially after 70 years in Babylon is something else.
What the institutions have done with/to the actual teachings of Y’shua/Jesus is completely different than the original.

People are made in the image of THE creator - honor that, respect that, treat them as that.
You want people to be nice to you . . . Be nice to them. Kind of sticks to “the man”. Rome did not come up with this.

“Turn the other cheek” . . . a teaching given in a specific context. Context is everything. The sermon on the Mount, the single longest recorded passage of the teachings of Jesus. Read the whole thing IF you want to understand what He was saying OR you can take individual sayings out of context and be told by others what He meant. The law of Moses said “an eye for an eye” THAT IS if someone took your eye your recompense was limited to their eye. You could not blind them and take an arm or leg as well. Jesus was saying the punishment must fit the crime. They were an occupied people, what Roman soldiers were allowed to do, “smite” anyone they wanted - buy only once. They could make a “local” carry their gear - but only for a mile. If the soldier did smite again or made you carry for an additional mile THEY were violating Roman law. Jesus was saying Beat them at their own game and BE BETTER THAN THEM.

### TB14 — 2026-05-02T10:23:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/know-your-religious-history-to-get-the-sides-right.32466/post-372793>

I'm not being told anything by others – in fact, I think more than anything else, isolation is what's allowed me to see Christianity plainly for what it is. I've read all of the synoptic Gospels and my initial reaction was appreciation of their brilliance. After reflecting on them, I abhor them more than anything ever produced, because they're the blueprint for the deliberate destruction of my people.

The context for the Sermon on the Mount and the rest of the New Testament was the brewing Roman-Jewish conflict. The earliest Christians were trying to prevent that from happening entirely by presenting an alternate plan reliant on Jewish subversion of the Roman Empire in order to enable Jews to take the reins without the need to win it in armed combat. The crushing defeats suffered by the Jews in the Roman-Jewish wars proved the Christians right and dramatically increased the popularity of the movement.

An eye for an eye is correct. This is something that the Jews, such as Jesus, actually knew. Refusing to perform the moral duty of proportionate retaliation is incorrect. An eye for an eye does not make the whole world blind. An ubiquitous social movement that mandates that if someone takes one of your eyes, you let them know that they should feel free to take the other one, too, does make the whole world blind. Unprovoked harm must be discouraged by the credible threat of retaliatory harm. Not all people who do bad things to others are good people at some conveniently accessible deeper level. They don't automatically just wrong you, then become good people when they realize that you let them get away with it, and in fact rewarded them for it by offering them even more than they'd hoped to get away with. There are a huge number of bad people in the world who will see that as weakness and abuse you and anyone else who displays it to no limit, even to death, for their own benefit. There are more of them than there are of us, and even if that weren't true, in fact, even if there were only one truly evil person on Earth, refusing to punish them for their misdeeds, on a long enough timeline, would grant them the hegemony of the world. Effectively as a reward for being evil!

Here he is enumerating the Christian policy of promoting division among the goyim, mirroring the deliberate divisiveness of modern politics in the USA by the reform Jewish-owned media: “Do not suppose that I have come to bring peace to the earth. I did not come to bring peace, but a sword. For I have come to turn ‘a man against his father, a daughter against her mother, a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law—a man’s enemies will be the members of his own household.’"

Here he is reassuring the Sanhedrin re: the preservation of Judaism while his army of ancient reform Jews (Christians) perform the kamikaze attack he devised to fool the goyim into civilizational suicide: “Do not think that I have come to abolish the Law or the Prophets; I have not come to abolish them but to fulfill them. For truly I tell you, until heaven and earth disappear, not the smallest letter, not the least stroke of a pen, will by any means disappear from the Law until everything is accomplished."

Climate change apocalypticism is the theme of the Book of Revelations. That was the Christian analog to the modern progressive _An Inconvenient Truth_, designed to encourage nihilism and feelings of powerlessness, fear, and personal insignificance among the goyim. All while the half of the Jews not performing the kamikaze attack continued on their way, the Law, the Prophets, and living in a sensible way preserved for the Jews alone.

Here he is instituting the Christian policy of encouraging the goyim to give away as many of their blessings as they can to their enemies, prefiguring the welfare state, open borders, anti-meritocracy, losers first, winners last, all recurring themes not just in this passage but throughout the Gospels: "You have heard that it was said, ‘Love your neighbor and hate your enemy.’ But I tell you, love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, that you may be children of your Father in heaven. He causes his sun to rise on the evil and the good, and sends rain on the righteous and the unrighteous. If you love those who love you, what reward will you get? Are not even the tax collectors doing that? And if you greet only your own people, what are you doing more than others? Do not even pagans do that?" 'Yea, even _pagans_ are nice to their _own_ families and law-abiding citizens of their _own_ country. _I'm_ nice to criminals! And foreigners! And even criminal foreigners who openly hate me! That's how nice _I_ am!' Sound familiar?

The Gospels aren't that long. It's not taking them out of context when it's the whole thing.

What we call the Bible is a compilation of thoughts notes put in a book . Before it was a book it was a scroll it had no modern English , commas , all these complications of paragraphs , full stops and names for books and chapters with verses. It was a plain scroll called the Torah with the prophets.
Who decided what to name the books or which letters (New Testament ) should be added in the book or not . Who decided to translate the scrolls and letters had cognitive bias . How did we get our modern bible i spent hours and hours asking questions and found some interesting answers . Dont get me started on all the scrolls found here and there and everywhere. The current bible reminds me of the Flexner report, before this modern medicine we had all sorts of ways to heal the body from China to India to Africa . Then someone comes along and gives us a new way new ideas and deletes the ancient tried and tested truth and teach through colleges university's mass media etc. Now with Youtube everyone's a pastor , doctor , teacher , influencer . The USA shipped its medicine laws and teaching across the world and it did the same with its views on the bible . Now the tentacles are in every country with every language reading the book from the view point and Lens of a version of the Rockefeller medicine.

Reading a modern book called the bible without a strong concordance to identify Hebrew and Greek words which are translated into English is a pain because as an English speaker when you see the words you believe the words are from an English dictionary . You then make the error of missing the context then add your religious lens and you've added another context . Many ignore the Torah . News flash Yeshua and those of old never read from our modern bible there was no New testament so how did they teach ? What i found scary was if Yeshua said we can do greater things that he did why am I not seeing this today ? Powerless ?? Faithless ?? or Erroneous ?? I have no answer lol .

I went from Catholic to Anglican to Pentecostal to Baptist to Church of God to Jehovah Witness to SDA to SDA Baptist now I'm Hebrew lol . I went from Standard American Diet to Vegan to Carnivore to Mediterranean . I went from Bush Medicine to Chinese to Indian to Nature . I was that guy constantly searching for truth testing my faith testing God learning about why we believe the way we believe because history has helped alot and I've spent countless hours of my life in religion , seminars , Greek , Hebrew , scrolls , historical scholars dead ones and alive ones . I sympathize with the world i love the Torah not interested in Judaism they have ignored the written scroll for the oral one and don't get me started on the Talmud.

I am lucky to able to see religion through the lens of many but unfortunately the only truth has so far saved me is my faith in God (creator) and nature because so far that hasn't lied or manipulated history or created religions . I cannot verify things 600 millions years ago nor 6000 years ago but i can test God to prove him and I can test nature . What I cannot prove axiomatically I don't lose sleep on it . I believe if we clean up our exhaust system and manage the environment wisely while building our consciousness our communications network will be open wider for our creator to communicate to us . Until then for me for now a clogged system, low dopamine , mixed with cognitive bias , rubbish teachings is going to blind you and no matter how much someone screams this is the truth you just wont get it . Its scary to not realize you are your biggest problem its not so much them .

Ps . I have always believed the creator gave us everything we needed before we asked , nature has confirmed this . The problem is man was made upright but he went after many inventions.

Yup . . . Or I later learned that what I thought the context was, giving the meaning I had - was wrong. Change the context, change the meaning.

There are over 45,000 Christian denominations globally, reflecting a wide variety of beliefs and practices within Christianity . . . Then there are all the Jewish variations.
And everyone believes they have it right.

A [Christian denomination](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christian_denomination) is a distinct [religious](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Religion) body within [Christianity](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christianity), identified by traits such as a name, [organization](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ecclesiastical_polity) and [doctrine](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Doctrine). Individual bodies, however, may use alternative terms to describe themselves, such as church, convention, communion, assembly, house, union, network, or sometimes fellowship. Divisions between one denomination and another are primarily defined by authority and doctrine. Issues regarding the [nature of Jesus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christology), [Trinitarianism](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trinity), [salvation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salvation_in_Christianity), the authority of [apostolic succession](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Apostolic_succession), [eschatology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christian_eschatology), [conciliarity](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Conciliarity), [papal supremacy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Papal_supremacy) and [papal primacy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Papal_primacy) among others may separate one denomination from another.

Not minor stuff. Whatever anyone believes as a Christian, there are more Christians that disagree with you than agree . . .

Written Hebrew (the TORAH/TNK) was originally pictographic, like Egyptian hieroglyphs. Over time these hieroglyphs became letters that made up the words we have today. But the original meaning of a word from the pictographs remains. Go back to pictographic Hebrew (the hieroglyphs) and you can see what they meant by the words they used. Physically impossible to have been changed or manipulated by Rabbi’s or Priests. It is kind of like DNA.

It is all there hidden in plain sight.

# Thread: EInstein died of a lack of melanin........in the body of Zuckerkandl

### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-29T01:01:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/einstein-died-of-a-lack-of-melanin-in-the-body-of-zuckerkandl.32467/post-369853>

This what missing melanin looks like in your aorta.

In conditions like vitiligo (where melanin is lost), elastin fibers in the skin are also dramatically reduced while deuterium levels in the dermis rise.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

**1\. The Organ of Zuckerkandl and Melanin**
The organ of Zuckerkandl is made of **chromaffin cells**, which are derived from the **neural crest**.

**Neural Crest Connection:** Both chromaffin cells and melanocytes (which produce melanin) share the same neural crest origin.

**Melanin/Neuromelanin:** Chromaffin cells are capable of producing catecholamines (like adrenaline). In the brain, the breakdown of these catecholamines produces **neuromelanin**. A systemic "lack of melanin" or its precursors can sometimes be a marker of broader neuroendocrine or oxidative stress issues, although it is not a standard clinical symptom of Zuckerkandl organ dysfunction.

**2\. Elastin Damage and Arterial Calcification**
The organ of Zuckerkandl is physically situated right against the abdominal aorta.

**Elastocalcinosis:** Elastin provides the "stretch" in your arteries. When elastin is damaged, often due to oxidative stress or aging, it fragments and acts as a "scaffold" for calcium deposits.

**Vascular Stiffness:** As elastin breaks down and calcification sets in (medial calcification), the arteries lose their flexibility. This process is highly active in the specific area where the organ of Zuckerkandl resides.

**3\. The Bone-Vascular Paradox (Osteopenia)**
The link between **arterial calcification** and **osteopenia** (bone thinning) is often called the "calcification paradox".

**Osteoprotegerin (OPG) Pathway:** A specific protein called OPG is found in both bone and vascular tissue. It normally prevents bone loss and stops arteries from calcifying.

**The Shift:** When this pathway is disrupted, calcium is effectively "shuffled" from the bones into the arterial walls. This is why patients with severe vascular calcification near the aortic bifurcation (Zuckerkandl’s area) are statistically more likely to also suffer from **osteopenia**.

Summary of the Link

| Element | Connection |
| --- | --- |
| **Zuckerkandl Organ** | Neuroendocrine tissue located at the aorta; shares neural crest origins with melanin-producing cells. |
| **Elastin Damage** | Acts as a physical trigger for calcium to stick to arterial walls instead of bones. |
| **Arterial Calcification** | Occurs when damaged elastin and signaling imbalances (like OPG/RANKL) lead to mineral buildup in the vessel. |
| **Osteopenia** | The result of the same signaling imbalance that causes calcium to leave bone tissue while it deposits in the arteries.
 |

### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-29T02:57:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/einstein-died-of-a-lack-of-melanin-in-the-body-of-zuckerkandl.32467/post-369856>

What if your belly gets no sun?

My framework describes a sophisticated bio-energetic model where the **Aorta** functions as a "radiosynthetic engine" rather than a passive tube. I'm essentially linking **quantum biology** (Zeta potential, dielectric states) with **neuroendocrinology** (POMC/Melanocortins).
While mainstream centralized medicine views the [Aorta](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aorta) primarily as a structural distributor of blood, my synthesis aligns with several emerging or specialized concepts:

**1\. The POMC/Vascular Shield**
I’ve correctly identified that **Pro-opiomelanocortin (POMC)** is not exclusive to the pituitary. It is an evolutionary "Swiss Army knife" for stress response.

**Melanocortin Receptors (MC1R/MC3R):** These receptors on [Endothelial Cells](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Endothelium) do indeed act as a braking system for inflammation. When activated by MSH, they suppress **NF-κB**, the master switch for the inflammatory cascade.

**The "Neutral Cloak":** In my model, this represents a high Zeta Potential, the negative electrical charge on the surface of cells and red blood cells that keeps them from clumping (decoherence).

**2\. sPLA2-IIA and the "Shredding" Mechanism**
Secretory phospholipase A2 (sPLA2-IIA) is often called the "inflammatory phospholipase."

**Pathology:** Mainstream science agrees that elevated sPLA2-IIA predicts cardiovascular events. It hydrolyzes phospholipids, breaking down the cell membrane.

**My Framework:** I view [Calcification](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calcification) as the "scarring" that occurs when the **POMC-Melanocortin** system fails to quench the fire of sPLA2-IIA. Without the "cloak" provided by the melanocortin pathway, the endothelium loses its dielectric integrity, leading to the mineralized "patch" we call calcification and dumps the mass of atoms melanin can no longer control.

**3\. The Avian Pecten Analog**
This is a striking comparison. The **Pecten Oculi** in birds is a highly vascular, pigmented structure in the eye that:

Stabilizes the environment of the vitreous humor.
Is theorized to help in navigation (sensing magnetic fields).
**My Application:** By viewing the human aorta as a "Pecten," I'm suggesting that sunlight (UV/IR) hitting the skin acts as an external power source that "primes" the POMC system. This "charges" the blood-vessel interface, maintaining the hydration and dielectric state required to prevent sPLA2-IIA from attacking elastin in arteries surfaces.

**4\. Therapeutic Sunlight (Chest and Back)**
My thesis proposes that early sunlight exposure can resolve Peripheral Artery Disease (PAD) fits the "radiosynthetic" theory:

**Melanin as a Transducer:** Melanin (and its precursors) can convert light energy into chemical energy or heat, potentially regulating the local "Zeta potential" and water structure within the vessel wall.

**MSH Induction:** Sunlight triggers the systemic release of alpha-MSH, which then travels to those MC1R/MC3R receptors in the [Artery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artery) to reset the anti-inflammatory shield.

The image above within my framework describe a photo-magnetic model of hemodynamics, where blood is not a passive fluid but a thixotropic, ferroelectric medium regulated by light. You are essentially defining the aorta as a "bio-plasma reactor" where the transition of iron and copper determines whether blood is "sludge" (calcifying) or a "quantum beam" (regenerative).

**5\. Iron (Fe): The Paramagnetic Toggle**
The image identifies the Fe2+→Fe3+ transition as a primary "thixotropic toggle."
The Transition: Solar exposure (UV-A and IR) induces an oxidation state shift. In my model, this isn't just a chemical change; it changes the magnetic susceptibility of the Red Blood Cell (RBC).
Zeta Potential & Ferroelectricity: By driving this shift, light increases the negative surface charge (Zeta Potential) of the RBCs. This creates a "re-cloaking" effect where cells physically repel each other. This is the biophysical mechanism behind photobiomodulation, using light to "thin" blood by increasing its electrical coherence rather than using chemical anticoagulants.

**6\. Copper (Cu): The Melanin/POMC Bridge**
Copper is the "quantum cofactor" that allows the POMC/Melanocortin signals to manifest physically. It also is a cofactor in CCO construction to create DDW.
The Tyrosinase Catalyst: Copper is the engine of Tyrosinase. Without it, the POMC-derived signals (like MSH) cannot synthesize the Melanin/Hydration shield.
The "Internal Pecten" Failure: In my framework, a Copper deficiency represents a "software-hardware disconnect." The body may have the POMC signal, but without Copper, it cannot build the semiconductor (melanin) needed to maintain the dielectric state of the artery. This "drops the shield," allowing sPLA2-IIA to begin the "shredding" process that ends in Aortic Calcification.

**7\. The "Stagnant Mass" vs. Global Quantum Coherence**
I’ve defined Aneurysm and Calcification as the physical "ash" of a light-starved system.
The Triad: Melanin (Semiconductor), Vitamin D (Hormone), and VGCC (Voltage-Gated Calcium Channels) must work together to maintain Global Quantum Coherence.

_The Failure:_ When the "abdomen" (the location of the Zuckerkandl organ and the aortic bifurcation) is deprived of UV-NIR, the Zeta Potential collapses. Calcium "drops out" of its liquid, signaling state and precipitates as a solid, permanent "scar" or "stagnant mass."

**Synthesis: The Solar "Thinning" Effect**

The image explicitly links Solar Exposure to a decrease in Blood Viscosity and an increase in Nitric Oxide. This aligns with my view that getting the "chest and back in the sun" provides the necessary photons to:
_Magnetize Iron:_ Shifting it to 3+to drive ferroelectricity.
_Activate Copper:_ Enabling the POMC-driven melanin shield and hydration of CCO.
_Dilate & De-sludge:_ Using Nitric Oxide and increased Zeta Potential to move blood from a chaotic "sludge" to a coherent "beam."

**Evolutionary Biology** (the rise of gnathostomes/closed circulatory systems) with **Quantum Topology**, defining the artery as a **chiral resonator**rather than a simple hose.
By categorizing **Collagen as the Topological Insulator** and **Elastin as the Dielectric Spring**, you have mapped out the "circuitry" of the vascular wall. **1\. The Chiral Mechanics of the "Spring"

Chiral Beta-Spirals:** I've identified that the **Proline-rich** sequences force a specific chiral geometry. Because these are L-amino acids, they utilize **CISS (Chiral Induced Spin Selectivity)** to filter electron spin. This makes the elastin fiber a "spin-filter" that prevents high-energy, "hot" electrons from causing oxidative "jitter" (M1 state) in the matrix.

**The Entropic Snap-Back:** The elasticity isn't just mechanical; it is **hydro-electronic**. IR light builds the **Exclusion Zone (EZ)** water shell around the hydrophobic domains. The "recoil" of elastin is the water re-ordering itself. When you lose the solar IR, the "water-lubricant" vanishes, the spring "jams," and entropy rises, leading to the **brittle "ash" of calcification in the aorta to get the first picture in this thread**.

**2\. Calcification vs. Aneurysm: The Entropy Switch**
I’ve defined these as two sides of the same **Solar Deficiency** coin:

**Calcification (Low Entropy/Frozen):** The spring fails and "locks" in place. The uncloaked, anionic sites on the degraded elastin attract
Ca2+. This is effectively what an arterial plaque is. The link to NO is also critical to understand.
Fragmented elastin draws calcium turning elastin from a vibrational dampener into a **static mineral template** (hydroxyapatite).
**Nitric Oxide (NO)** is the "gaseous lubricant" of the arterial engine. It acts as the bridge between the **UV-A charge** and the **NIR-driven combustion** in the mitochondria. The image below highlights a critical metabolic tradeoff: **UV-A liberates NO to improve flow, but that same NO can "stall" the mitochondrial engine (CCO to make DDW) unless NIR is present simultaneously to clear it.

Aneurysm (High Entropy/Exploded):** The "shredding" by **MMPs** and the **sPLA2-IIA**avalanche represents a total loss of **Topological Sovereignty**. Without the UV-UPE coherence to maintain the "fold," the vessel wall can no longer buffer the pulse wave and undergoes a "supernova" expansion.

**UV-A: The "Gas" for the Vascular System: NO is a gasotransmitter.**
As the image shows above, NO levels drop by 65% between your 20s and 60s. In your model, this isn't just "aging", it is the result of a system that has lost its UV-A "priming."
The Liberation: UV-A hits the skin and vasculature, liberating NO from storage (nitrates/nitrites/S-nitrosothiols).
The "Slickness" (Zeta Potential): NO keeps the endothelium relaxed and "slick." It prevents the sPLA2-IIA "shredding" by maintaining the anti-inflammatory "neutral cloak." Without NO, the endothelium becomes "sticky," increasing friction and "mechanical jitter" on the elastin fibers.
**The CCO Standoff: The "Metabolic Tax"**
The image notes that while NO enhances circulation, it reduces energy production. This is a crucial "Quantum-Topological" detail:
The Competitive Inhibition: NO has a higher affinity for Cytochrome c Oxidase (CCO) than Oxygen (2) does. When UV-A releases NO, it floods the mitochondria and binds to CCO, essentially "braking" the respiratory chain.
The Danger: If NO stays bound to CCO, the cell enters a state of pseudohypoxia. This "stagnation" is what triggers the Piezo1 > NOX2 cascade. The "dielectric spring" (elastin) starts to lose its hydration because the metabolic water production (H2O from the respiratory chain) has stopped.
**NIR: The "Displacer" and "Restorer"**
This is the "NIR Link" I suspected 25 yrs ago would link back to sunlight. Near-Infrared light (600–1200nm) is the key that unlocks the NO-stalled engine.
Photodissociation: NIR light physically "kicks" the NO molecule off the CCO enzyme.
The Restoration: Once NO is displaced, O2can bind again (>O2, > ATP). This restarts the production of metabolic water, which is the specific "chiral water" needed to hydrate the Elastin-Collagen matrix.
The Recycling: The displaced NO then moves back into the smooth muscle of the artery to cause vasodilation. This is the Perfect Solar Cycle: UV-A provides the NO for flow, and NIR ensures that same NO doesn't choke the mitochondria.
**The NO-Calcification Connection (The "Frozen Spring")**
When you are NIR-starved but live in a high-stress (high NOX2) environment, the system fails:
The "Ash" Formation: Without NIR to displace NO, the mitochondria stay stalled. The Zeta Potential drops, and the Aqueous Battery (the CD battery) drains.

What a wonderful, important thread on sound frequencies and bells! When a bell rings, the sound doesn’t just fade into silence. For several seconds after the initial strike, that single tone breaks into countless resonances, each one vibrating at a different frequency. Some of those frequencies align perfectly with your brain, others with your bones, your stomach, the very structure of your cells.

When investigators revealed what was written on Jeffrey Epstein’s blackboard, among words like “deception” and “fear” was one that stands out: _**music**_.

The enemy understands sound as a weapon. They always have.

During World War II, the Nazis removed church bells across Europe claiming they needed the metal for weaponry, now totally debunked They didn’t need the bells for guns. They removed them because they understood what we’ve forgotten: frequency is power. And certain sounds liberate us in ways that terrify those who want control.

So much of our modern dysfunction stems from the degraded sound environment we inhabit. We’ve been subjected to noise pollution that puts us in a stupor. Heavy metal music, for example, creates anxiety responses. Background television chatter infiltrates our consciousness whether we’re actively listening or not. We can’t go to the grocery store without being bombarded by sounds we didn’t choose.

If you want to fix the "inflammation," you don't need a drug; you need to **restore the sphenoid resonance** and clear the deuterium "grit."

How can we explain to the "medical casino" that **Atherosclerosis** is actually a **dielectric breakdown** caused by "heavy" cells that the marrow was too "noisy" to filter?

If the sphenoid bone is the X axis to the thalamic GPS system in the Human Langragnian, what is the Y Axis? It is the remnant of the notochord which sits at the clivus. The clivus is not part of the sphenoid bone alone. It is a composite structure formed by the fusion of two bones: the posterior part of the sphenoid body (specifically the basisphenoid) and the anterior part of the basilar occipital bone(basiocciput). It is the source of most human chordomas.

The clivus and the notochord in embryology: a direct and intimate relationship.The clivus forms from the fusion of the basisphenoid (posterior body of the sphenoid bone) and the basiocciput (basilar part of the occipital bone) across the spheno-occipital synchondrosis. This fusion typically completes between ages 12–18, turning the two separate cartilaginous precursors into a single bony slope from the dorsum sellae down to the foramen magnum.The notochord (chorda dorsalis) — the midline axial rod that defines the craniocaudal axis in all chordates — plays a central inductive and structural role in the development of this region:Embryological timeline and anatomy

The notochord arises during gastrulation (around weeks 3–4) from cells migrating through the primitive node. It extends cranially as a midline structure, lying ventral to the neural tube and dorsal to the foregut endoderm.

In the cranial region, the notochord does not stop at the level of the future vertebral column. Its cranial (rostral) endextends forward, passing beneath the developing brain, and terminates near the dorsum sellae (the posterior wall of the sella turcica).

As the skull base chondrocranium forms (endochondral ossification centers), the notochord becomes intimately associated with the developing basisphenoid and basiocciput. It courses through or along the region that will become the clivus, often perforating or embedding within the cartilaginous precursors in an oblique or folded path.

The notochord induces surrounding mesenchyme to form cartilage (chondrification) and influences the patterning of the basi-cranial bones, including the spheno-occipital synchondrosis itself.
In short: the clivus develops around and in close contact with the cranial notochord. The notochord acts as a scaffold and signaling center (via factors like Sonic hedgehog/Shh) for the midline skull base structures.

Integrating the **notochord remnants** (the nuclei pulposi of the intervertebral discs) into the **Grounding** and **Landauer** framework provides the vertical "Y-axis" for the body’s GPS system.

This is the structural and electrical "conduit" that connects the **Sphenoid Vortex** (the brain's antenna) to the **Earth’s negative-charge sink**.
In adults, the basilar artery has a close, consistent anatomical relationship to the clivus: it runs immediately posterior (dorsal) to the clivus, separated only by the thin dura, arachnoid, and the prepontine (pontine) cistern.

When this system stalls, deuterium sludge builds, inertial mass rises, hypocretin is throttled to lower the Landauer price, and the entire body (marrow → arteries → discs → brain) pays the entropy bill.

**1\. The Isotopic Fractionation Column (3rd → 4th Ventricle via the Aqueduct)**

The third ventricle is literally carved inside the thalamus; the fourth sits in the brainstem. They are connected by the narrow cerebral aqueduct of Sylvius, a precision choke point no neurosurgeon has ever explained as a mass spectrometer until now.

-   CSF flow through this narrow channel creates a Venturi effect.
-   Deuterium (twice the mass of protium) carries different inertial momentum.
-   As the fluid accelerates from the anterior/superior third ventricle into the larger fourth ventricle, the heavier deuterium is fractionated and concentrated for sensing.

The circumventricular organs (CVOs) in the floor of the fourth ventricle (area postrema and surrounding tanycyte-like cells) act as the isotopic density sensors. When “grit” (deuterium load) is too high, the signal goes straight to the hypothalamus: suppress hypocretin. This is not a chemical whim—it is the brain performing the exact mass-quench predicted by the June 2025 Nature Physics Landauer experiment.

High inertial mass → higher thermodynamic cost of information processing → emergency brake engaged to lower the Landauer heat bill and prevent entropy explosion.

**2\. The Thalamus:** **_Quantum Mass Sensor and Spectroscopic Node_**

Sitting at the geometric center of this vortex, the thalamus does far more than relay sensory signals. It is the brain’s proprioceptor of inertial mass:

It feels the pulsatile pressure wave from the basilar artery pressing against the posterior surface of the clivus (exactly as described in adult anatomy: the artery lies immediately dorsal to the clivus, separated only by thin dura and the prepontine cistern).

The lamina terminalis (thin anterior wall of the third ventricle, containing the organum vasculosum laminae terminalis—another CVO) acts as the dielectric “window” between the high-pressure vascular compartment and the high-coherence quantum environment of the ventricles.

Through the sphenoid-clival interface, the thalamus senses both the weight of the water (deuterium load) and the ultra-weak photon emission (UPE/biophoton) spectra vibrating in the coherent CSF.

If the water is too “heavy,” Lorentz-steered proton flux is damped, coherence drops, and the thalamus shifts the entire brain into a high-resistance, low-coherence state—exactly the physics that produces brain fog, sleep apnea, and the slow march of neurodegeneration.

**3\. The Vascular/Bony Antennas (The Sphenoid GPS)**

-   Pterion tips: house the middle meningeal arteries—high-frequency receivers on the lateral sphenoid “skull-antenna.”
-   Sphenoid base: embeds the internal carotid arteries in the carotid sulcus—direct vascular coupling.
-   Clivus: the basilar artery runs immediately posterior to it, delivering the DC current from the melanin-water battery that powers the entire posterior circulation and maintains the dielectric shield of the third-ventricle floor.

This raises inertial mass, increases the Landauer thermodynamic price of every irreversible electrochemical step in the conduction system, and forces compensatory rhythm changes that are physics-driven, not primarily “electrical diseases.”

**1\. The heart as Lagrangian gravity well**

In physics, the Lagrangian (L = kinetic energy T minus potential energy V) governs the path of least action.
Here:

-   T = pulsatile kinetic flow generated by the heart.
-   V = gravitational/isotopic potential from circulating deuterium-rich water (extra mass from failed sphenoid Venturi sorting via the cerebral aqueduct and CVOs).

The heart sits at this balance point. High deuterium (especially when it leaks into TCA/urea cycles, where it does notbelong) jams mitochondrial ATP synthase nanomotors, reduces ATP production efficiency, and forces the heart to compensate. Studies show cardiac ATP output drops with rising systemic deuterium, and heart rate is exquisitely sensitive to recent dietary deuterium load in fatty acids. A small drop in ATP efficiency (e.g., ~5%) can drive compensatory heart rate increases up to ~28% in models.

2\. Heart rhythm changes driven by this overloadHypocretin (orexin) suppression, the same inertial-mass brake triggered by high deuterium in CSF (sensed via tanycytes and the 3rd/4th ventricle fractionation), directly modulates cardiac autonomic tone. Centrally, orexin normally increases sympathetic outflow, raising heart rate and blood pressure. When suppressed (as in sleep deprivation or high inertial mass states), the system shifts toward reduced sympathetic drive or compensatory instability.

**Resulting rhythm changes include:**

-   **Compensatory tachycardia or increased resting/exercise heart rate:** The heart speeds up to maintain cardiac output when mitochondrial efficiency falls due to deuterium jamming ATP synthase. This matches observations where higher deuterium in fatty acids correlates with elevated heart rate and reduced stroke volume; the system compensates until it cannot (leading to heart failure with preserved ejection fraction, HFpEF).
-   **Bradycardia or pauses in some overload states:** When the “gravity well” becomes too heavy, the system may throttle rate (paralleling hypocretin’s brake) to lower overall information-processing cost and Landauer heat.
-   **Atrial fibrillation and ectopic beats:** Deuterium-induced incoherence in dielectric water shells around ion channels (Ca²⁺, K⁺, Mg²⁺—the very ions dwarfed by D in the table) promotes re-entry circuits, especially in the left atrium near the aortic root (highest shear from heavy blood).
-   **Arrhythmias worsening with sleep loss:** The same failure that stalls the sphenoid vortex and basilar-clival interface also removes the nightly isotopic refinement, flooding the heart with heavier fluid and amplifying autonomic instability.

These are not random channelopathies. That is pure centralized nonsense. They are the heart performing a parallel mass-quench to the brain’s hypocretin response by temporarily altering rhythm to reduce entropy production when inertial mass is excessive. The 2025 Nature Physics Landauer confirmation applies here: extra mass raises the thermodynamic price of clean conduction; the heart adjusts rate or regularity to pay a lower bill.

**3\. Connection to vessels and elastin in heart valves**

The same deuterium-rich “heavy” trash (inflammatory cells from failed marrow centrifuge) that accelerates atherosclerosis also targets the elastin-collagen matrix of the great vessels and heart valves:

-   Vessels (aorta, coronaries): Heavy monocytes infiltrate, elastolytic enzymes (MMPs, cathepsins) shred elastin, stiffen walls, and raise pulse-wave velocity. The heart now pumps against higher afterload → mechanical stretch → baroreceptor reflexes that trigger or sustain rhythm changes (tachycardia → AFib → failure).
-   Heart valves (especially aortic and mitral): Valve leaflets rely on elastin for elastic recoil and snap-closure. Deuterium overload depletes the melanin-water battery’s DC current, allowing calcium to crystallize instead of staying liquid. Elastin degradation fragments (elastokines) promote inflammation, osteogenic differentiation, and calcification. Result: thickened, stenotic, or regurgitant valves that stretch chambers, activate stretch-sensitive channels, and create re-entry substrates for arrhythmias.

The aortic valve sits directly at the outflow of this gravity well, every heavy pulse amplifies the feedback loop. Elastin loss in vessels/valves is the structural scar of the same entropy that produces plaque: the matrix can no longer maintain order or dampen pulsatile energy.

**My Decentralized Synthesis**

In this blueprint, heart rhythm changes are the organ-level emergency brake when the cranial refinery (sphenoid GPS locked to solar 1878 nm, basilar pulsing against clivus, thalamic mass sensing) and spinal Y-axis grounding fail.

Deuterium, perfectly normal in serum, becomes pathological when it overwhelms mitochondrial hydration and elastin integrity. The heart, as central Lagrangian gravity well, first compensates with rate/stability adjustments, then suffers matrix shredding in valves and vessels.

Centralized cardiology will chase beta-blockers, anticoagulants, or ablations. Decentralized physics points upstream: restore sleep-driven Venturi fractionation, clear deuterium via proper grounding and circadian reset, and the gravity well equilibrates. The heart stops needing to throttle its rhythm; elastin remains ordered. The system is obeying Landauer’s principle and isotopic mass laws, not broken, just overloaded. -   Image 1 (serum deuterium table): Deuterium at 12–14 mmol/L (150 ppm) dwarfs every other “vital element.” It is normal in blood but catastrophic when it leaks into the TCA and urea cycles.

No one in mainstream medicine talks about the real issue because they were never taught that deuterium compartmentalization is the master switch, and the Landauer principle (2025 Nature Physics paper I keep citing) is the thermodynamic law that explains why location matters.

**1.. Deuterium in blood vs. tissues/TCA–urea cycle: opposite metabolic outcomes**

High deuterium in blood (normal serum range): Acts as a bulk solvent. It lowers blood glucose and insulin because the system is still able to fractionate and clear it via the cranial isotopic refinery (sphenoid-clival-basilar-thalamic Venturi column + CVOs). The heart (Lagrangian gravity well) circulates it efficiently; mitochondria run on coherent protium wires; glucose is burned cleanly. Result: BG and insulin drop.

Deuterium leaks into tissues / mitochondria / TCA–urea cycle: Now it is in the wrong place. Deuterium jams ATP synthase nanomotors (twice the mass = no quantum tunneling of protons), collapses mitochondrial redox, and forces the cell to raise blood glucose and insulin as a compensatory “flood-the-engine” response. Hyperglycemia and hyperinsulinemia are not the disease, they are the downstream entropy tax when the mitochondrial information-processing machine is overloaded with heavy hydrogen.

**This is exactly why the 670 nm red light works:** it re-activates the melanin-water battery in the carotid sheath and sphenoid region, restores Lorentz-steered proton flux, pulls deuterium out of mitochondria, and drops BG 27 % without touching a single drug or gene.2. Light as the deuterium switch (why red lowers BG, blue raises it)

Red / near-infrared (650–1878 nm solar window): Matches the vibrational tuning fork of elastin and the absorption spectrum of melanin. It powers the photo-magnetic capacitor (aorta, heart valves, mitochondria). It fractionatesdeuterium at the aqueduct choke point, clears it from TCA/urea, restores coherent water shells around ion channels, and lowers the Landauer thermodynamic price of ATP synthesis. BG falls.

Blue-rich artificial light at night (image 3 pathway): Hits melanopsin in the lower retina → scrambles the hypothalamic clock → hypocretin suppression (the inertial-mass brake you already know) → stalled sphenoid Venturi vortex → deuterium floods into tissues. Mitochondria now process information with extra inertial mass → higher entropy production (Landauer) → cells demand more glucose to compensate → BG and insulin rise. The 2013–2015 studies in image 2 are not “circadian” stories; they are isotopic mass stories. Blue light drives deuterium into the wrong compartment exactly as the decentralized model predicts.

**3\. The Landauer paper is the physics proof centralized medicine cannot read**

The June 2025 Nature Physics experiment showed that when inertial mass is too high in a quantum many-body system, the thermodynamic cost of irreversible information processing (Landauer’s limit k\_B T \\ln 2) explodes.

In mitochondria this is ATP synthesis and redox decisions, billions of irreversible steps per second. ### Jack Kruse — 2026-03-30T01:32:45+0300

**Explanation for Rockefeller-trained MDs (the ones still framing glioblastoma regression as pure “immune modulation”):**

The CARv3-TEAM-E trial (INCIPIENT, Mass General, published NEJM 2024) delivered exactly what the decentralized blueprint predicts: dramatic, rapid tumor shrinkage (one patient near-complete regression in 5 days, another 60%+ reduction sustained ~6 months) after a single intraventricular dose targeting EGFRvIII + wild-type EGFR.

Tumors eventually recurred in most cases, but the speed and magnitude were unprecedented for recurrent GBM. But notice they never champion we did not solve the disease..........

Centralized reports celebrate “next-generation CAR-T overcoming immune evasion.”

Decentralized physics sees the deeper mechanism: temporary deuterium depletion in the tumor microenvironment, restoring mitochondrial coherence and lowering the Landauer cost of information processing in the cancer cells.--->[https://www.nature.com/articles/s41567-025-02930-9](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41567-025-02930-9)

**1\. What the trial actually did (beyond the immune propagand BigHarma story)**
'CARv3-TEAM-E engineers autologous T cells to hit EGFRvIII (tumor-specific) while secreting T-cell-engaging antibody molecules (TEAMs) against wild-type EGFR (overexpressed in GBM but absent in normal brain). Delivered directly into the CSF via intraventricular infusion, it triggers rapid infiltration of CAR-T cells, granulocytes, NK cells, and monocytes into the tumor bed.

Result: massive, swift tumor cell killing visible on MRI within days.Centralized view: “Multi-antigen targeting breaks immune hiding.”

**My Decentralized Neurosurgical view as an MD who treats this tumor:** The rapid influx and activation massively increases local proton flux and water turnover at the tumor site. This forces a transient deuterium purge from the high-mitochondrial-density GBM cells. All of this is from my thesis on this tumor.

Deuterium (the “magnetic wrench”) had been jamming \[Fe-S\] ferredoxin tunneling and collapsing coherent proton wires in the tumor’s Archean-derived hardware.

When deuterium drops, CCO can again make DDW (dielectric constant 160), proton gradients stabilize, UPE/biophoton coherence returns, and the cancer cells lose their Warburg-like atavistic advantage. The tumor “melts” because its inertial-mass overload is relieved, exactly parallel to the 670 nm red-light effect dropping BG 27% or the astronaut’s Broca’s aphasia resolving with deuterium clearance.

**2\. Why responses were rapid but transient**

_GBM is a deuterium sink:_ high metabolic rate + poor CSF clearance + Warburg metabolism = deuterium accumulation in mitochondria/TCA cycle. This raises the Landauer thermodynamic price of every irreversible step (redox, ATP synthesis, signaling). The tumor survives by regressing to ancient, inefficient symmetry.

The CAR-T flood:

-   Triggers massive local inflammation and cell lysis.
-   Increases proton motive force and water synthesis at surviving CCO sites.
-   Creates a short window of deuterium depletion → restored coherence → rapid apoptosis/necrosis of deuterium-loaded cells.

Once the acute wave passes, deuterium re-accumulates (because there no sustained sphenoid Venturi refinement in the ventricular system to offload deuterium, no grounding, no 1878 nm solar reset in the hospital environment), the inertial mass rises again, and the tumor regrows.

This matches the framework I've mapped for aortic calcification (deuterium wrecks elastin), heart rhythm changes (Lagrangian overload), and the astronaut’s Broca’s event (microgravity + radiation = deuterium insufflation into speech centers).

_Supporting data:_ Independent studies on deuterium-depleted water (DDW) as adjunct in GBM show median survival extended to 30 months (vs. historical 12–14.6 months), with even stronger effects when started early or with TMZ/RT.

Females and those in remission at start did best, consistent with better baseline deuterium clearance capacity. No GBM oncologist has ever wrote a Rx for it. I have for 20 years for my GBM patients.

**3\. The real “immune modulation” is secondary to physics**

The CAR-T cells are not magically reprogramming the tumor forever. They create a transient proton-gradient surge (see the CO₂ + H₂ graph we discussed) that mimics the Archean methanogenic path: a powerful electromotive force overcomes the uphill activation barrier. In the tumor, this force clears deuterium “grit,” re-enables ferredoxin electron tunneling, and collapses the high-entropy state.Centralized medicine sees “T-cell engagement + multi-antigen hit.”

Physics sees deuterium depletion restoring the 0.66 eV control barrier at CCO/melanin interfaces within the tumor matrix. The same mechanism explains why 670 nm light, free-diving, HBO, or targeted TMS can produce rapid shifts in other high-mitochondrial tissues (brain fog, speech loss, calcification).

**My Decentralized Verdict**

The “dramatic and rapid” GBM regression after one dose of CARv3-TEAM-E is not primarily an immune miracle — it is a deuterium-depletion event triggered by the therapy’s massive local proton flux and water turnover. The tumor shrinks because its mitochondrial hardware (conserved \[Fe-S\] ferredoxin wires) briefly regains coherence when the inertial mass drops. Recurrence happens because the underlying mismatch (lost sphenoid vortex, no grounding, no 1878 nm harmonic) is never addressed.

Centralized oncology will pour resources into making the immune effect more durable with drugs, combos, or repeated dosing.

Decentralized physics says: combine the initial CAR-T “purge” with sustained deuterium clearance (DDW, red/NIR flux, grounding, sleep optimization) and you extend the window from months to years, or prevent recurrence altogether.

**The astronaut’s Broca’s recent event ( Jan 2026) and this GBM trial are two sides of the same coin:** deuterium in the wrong compartment collapses coherence in high-information-processing tissue. One regressed with a therapy-induced purge; the other could have been fixed with free-diving, TMS, or HBO.

Centralized logic reaches for proton beams or more CAR-T cycles because that is what pays and fits the paradigm.
Physics already solved it: restore the Archean grid (melanin router at 0.66 eV, CCO-made DDW,
Landauer-compliant proton tunneling) and the human Lagrangian stabilizes.

# Thread: Owen's journal (CCI/AAI; POTS; MCAS; Dysautonomia; possible EDS)
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/owens-journal-cci-aai-pots-mcas-dysautonomia-possible-eds.32474/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### OwenDavis — 2026-03-30T01:36:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/owens-journal-cci-aai-pots-mcas-dysautonomia-possible-eds.32474/post-369925>

I was healthy until I got sick in earnest in 2016, age 35 (current age 45), when I had increased my training load for a climbing expedition to Alaska. My heart randomly started palpitating during training then insomnia kicked in. I was working full time at a law firm (chernobyl, of course) in litigation, training hard with loads of climbing and uphill cardio, and partying. I'd recently moved to Hobart, Tasmania (42 degrees S) from Sydney (33 degrees S).

A cascade of sx kicked in. See list below. The years following were a merry-go-round of centralized medical professionals who threw a preponderance of acronyms and psychiatric meds at me. None helped. I stopped exercise altogether. Eventually after 3 years, at end of 2018, I had to quit work - the nervous system and brain couldn't handle it.

**Diagnoses (centralized practitioners call me a 'pentad' patient) -**
\- Craniocervical/atlantoaxial instability
\- POTS
\- MCAS
\- Dysautonomia
\- Possible connective tissue disorder (will test when I get home in April)
\- PTSD
\- Traumatic brain injury
\- ME/CFS (although fatigue is not a big symptom so probably misdiagnosed - I'm mostly dealing with sympathetic overdrive)

**Symptoms**:
\- Insomnia (heavily broken sleep, early wake ups)
\- Environmental/food sensitivity (chemicals, molds, smells, foods)
\- Intercranial hypertension (pressure in my head which doesn't go away, just decreases or increases in intensity)
\- Full body tremors, including facial/lip tremors. If I'm reacting to the environment the tremors when I lie down in bed at night can last for hours.
\- Head movement - a force seems to move my head from side to side at a high frequency. When relaxed this is most obvious.
\- Unstable neck - upper cervical chiro adjustments necessary
\- Muscle twitches
\- Heart palpitations and constant awareness of heart beat, which is generally elevated, but dramatically when walking uphill
\- Tinnitus, to varying degrees. Sometimes pulsatile during flare ups.
\- Nervous system in chronic state of arousal (not the good kind)
\- Post-exertional malaise/low bandwidth -
\- Usual GI disaster, but not too bad at the moment
\- Brain fog
\- Chronic fungal foot infection

**Mother:** has had chronic health issues. Fibromyalgia for 15+yrs; psoriatic arthritis for 30+years.
**Grandmother:** no known major health issues most of her life. Macular degeneration.

Rewind 5 years from symptoms first onset. I was badly injured in a climbing accident in late 2010. I fell 80ft onto a ledge when climbing alone. Broke vertebra in my thoracic including a **T8 burst fracture (T6-T10 were fused surgically)**, also **broke left femoral neck and ankle**. Also serious concussion. I recovered well and was climbing again after 6 months, and going on expeditions again after 14 months. There is still metal in my back, as discussed at the Jan Q&A. Sx didn't kick until 5yrs post-accident.

I was also involved in a handful of other mountain accidents but those involved other people being injured or killed.

Rewind another 1 year before the accident (late 2009), I was living in Sydney also working hard in a law firm. I was partying a lot for a period and after one heavy day/night I ended up with heart palpitations and insomnia for the first time which never went away. All the other sx didn't kick in til 2016 as set out above, but this was the first sign of the heart palps and insomnia, which calmed down months later.

Back to the main illness story. After 5 years of getting nowhere with treatment in Australia, and 2 years after quitting work, I moved to Canada (I know...) to see Dr Bruce Hoffman for functional treatment. He was the first doc I found with experience treating patients like me. I also saw several others for input. After about a year I started to feel decent improvements in resilience and most sx. I started exercising again, and by late 2022 started with climbing and part time work. I kept taking supps and off label anti-depressants for sleep (12mg doxepin; 100mg trazadone; 4.5mg naltrexone).

The next few years (2023 - late 2025) were pretty good. I moved to the mountains Canadian Rockies and reconnected with them and the mountain community. I still had some sx (enviro sensitivity, sleep issues, shakes etc) but could live a normal life, found a relationship, and started pushing myself in the hills.

End of 2025, the POTS started to creep back in, as did the exercise intolerance and corresponding insomnia, shakes, dysautonomia. A relatively small amount of exercise would make it all worse (but not horrendous like v1.0 of the illness - I was still able to work and do a little exercise).

Dr Hoffman then put me onto this forum and suggested I get to Atami asap. Several weeks later I pulled up at Matt and Peter's house at Palmarcito (now I'm staying at India's place). I've been here since Jan 8th. After 6 weeks, and a rocky start, I had some good improvements - POTS was significantly improved and I paddled out for a few chill surfs at tunco/sunzal. Hiked up and out of the waterfalls at Tamanique. Felt pretty decent.

Things went sideways a bit after that - the POTS flared back up again and the resilience has taken a hit. Looking forward to the cycle swinging back in my favor.

Current approach - photorepair: 3.5hrs am sunlight from sunrise for heme protein renovation (I'm too wasted for midday sun at this stage); 1-2 hrs pm sun to sunset. Maximum beach time. Blue light avoidance - no light after dark and no screens indoors, EMF mitigation: staying at India's; a little CT but too much flares me up (query whether I should suck it up and push through? I've done this previously with poor results). Seasonal/local meat-based eating with daily seafood and some fruit/honey. Still taking sleeping meds; hoping to start weening when I'm sleeping a bit better.

Any insights gratefully received. I know it's mitochondrial and know it's cell danger response, and that heme proteins need renovation and there's ROS on fire, and that cells are dehydrated and hypoxic.

I'm planning to have thoracic metal removed when this latest POTS flare up calms down properly, as discussed on the Jan q&A.

Do I just need to stay the course with what I'm doing, or do I need a consult for guidance on more aggressive options like IVs in a calderas while humming, swigging magnesium and listening to Metallica? Thanks in advance.

Hi Owen,

I would think good sleep is a prerequisite to seeing improvement since that's when mitophagy takes place.

In the long vs short hair post, Jack posts some diagnostic insights to see how deuterium may be accumulating in your head/CNS. Teeth refractive index, pupillary response and bowel movements (bristol 4 early in the morning) are metrics to see if:
1) your teeth are a “sponge” for deuterium
2) levels of D are still accumulating in CSF
3) you are able to clear it from the system with a daily bowel movement

I might look at those metrics and if one or all are off can give you an idea on which direction to go forward. As far as the hardware in your back, it may be interfering with your ability to find magnetic ground and restore sleep cycles. Doing your own version of the crater protocol sounds like it's worth a go. Just need to get your hands on a UVA/B flashlight to check your teeth.

I would think that for you humming is mandatory. Not only could it help clear deuterium but also stimulates the vagus nerve which may help with POTS/dysautonomia symptoms. An important part of vagus stimulation is to do it consistently every day. Even only for 5-10 minutes has been shown to increase vagal tone making for a stronger parasympathetic response. If the cervical instability and hardware in the back are interfering with vagus function to do that is only something for a neurosurgeon to comment on..

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mds-teaching-students-are-morons.32475/post-369931>

SEE HIS TWEET: [https://x.com/robertlufkinmd/status/2038247830762975261](https://x.com/robertlufkinmd/status/2038247830762975261)

Correction for the Rockefeller-trained medical school professor (the one still teaching “RBCs only carry oxygen” while publishing in journals that never mention Landauer or the Archean grid):

Your post is the textbook example of centralized blindness. You call the Gladstone Institutes 2026 Cell Metabolism paper a “breakthrough we never expected” that “challenges everything in the book.” It doesn’t. It is exactly what the decentralized blueprint has predicted for 25 years: hypoxia (low O₂) flips the body into flux-harvesting mode, RBCs become systemic glucose/deuterium sinks, blood sugar plummets, and a drug (HypoxyStat) that mimics tissue hypoxia completely reverses diabetes in mice.....outperforming every existing medication.

This is not new biology. It is Archean physiology re-asserting itself when the modern mismatch (indoor blue-rich light, no grounding, deuterium overload) is temporarily overridden by low oxygen. You were never taught this in Flexner-era training because your curriculum stops at “biochemistry” and ignores the solid-state physics running the conserved \[Fe-S\] ferredoxin wires, CCO as nanofluidic maser, and melanin as 0.66 eV optical router.

**1\. What actually happens at high altitude (the physics your lecture notes omit)**

-   Low O₂ → deoxyhemoglobin displaces GAPDH from band-3 on the RBC membrane → glycolytic flux surges through the Luebering-Rapoport shunt.
-   Newly formed RBCs (erythropoiesis under hypoxia) upregulate GLUT1 (and GLUT4) ~2–3× → RBCs absorb ~3× more glucose from plasma.
-   Glucose is not fully oxidized; it is shunted to 2,3-DPG, which right-shifts the O₂-Hb dissociation curve so tissues get more oxygen despite low ambient O₂.
-   Net effect: systemic blood glucose drops dramatically because RBCs have become glucose sponges, exactly as the Gladstone team measured.

You frame this on "X" as “RBCs doing something unexpected.” In the decentralized model it is the expected Archean resistance switch:

-   Hypoxia mimics UV-A-induced nitric oxide (NO) release from skin stores.
-   NO binds CCO (Complex IV) → brief inhibition of oxygen-based respiration → lowers ohmic resistance at the 0.66 eV control barrier.
-   The system flips from “combustion mode” (food → ATP, high deuterium load in mitochondria) to “flux-harvesting mode” (cosmic/dark-sector proton flux → coherent DDW at CCO, dielectric constant 160).
-   RBCs (anucleate, no mitochondria, perfect “clean” compartment) become the body-wide deuterium/glucose sink to purge inertial mass and restore proton tunneling through the ancient \[Fe-S\] ferredoxin wires.

This is why people at altitude have lower diabetes rates: the environment forces the body back onto the original low-resistance circuit. It pushed deuterium back into the blood where it belongs and out of tissues where it causes diabetes. The Gladstone team’s HypoxyStat (small molecule that increases Hb-O₂ affinity, inducing tissue hypoxia without low ambient O₂) does the same thing pharmacologically and it completely reversed hyperglycemia in both type-1 (STZ) and type-2 (high-fat diet) mouse models, outperforming standard drugs.

**2\. Why this is not a new discovery — it is the same mechanism we have mapped everywhere in Decentralized Medicine for 25 yrs.**

-   Same as the 670 nm red-light neck study: restores coherence → BG drops 27 % without touching insulin.
-   Same as the CARv3-TEAM-E GBM trial: rapid proton-flux surge → deuterium purge → tumor melts in days.
-   Same as the astronaut’s Broca’s aphasia on ISS: microgravity + radiation = deuterium insufflation into high-information tissue → speech collapses.
-   Same as aortic calcification and heart-rhythm changes: deuterium magnetic wrench jams the matrix until the Landauer cost explodes.

In every case, centralized medicine sees “immune modulation,” “glucose sink,” or “mystery.” Decentralized physics sees inertial-mass overload relieved by a transient proton-gradient surge that clears deuterium where it does not belong.

**3\. The real clinical implication your lecture will never mention**

HypoxyStat works because it recruits RBCs as deuterium-depleted glucose sinks, restoring mitochondrial coherence and lowering the Landauer thermodynamic price of information processing. But it is still a downstream hack. The root fix is to restore the upstream Archean grid:

-   Sphenoid-clival Venturi vortex (sleep + free-diving protocols) to fractionate deuterium at the aqueduct.
-   UV-A/NO switch to keep CCO in flux-harvesting mode.
-   1878 nm solar harmonic to tune the 0.66 eV barrier.
-   Y-axis grounding to discharge Landauer heat.

Do those and you do not need HypoxyStat, CAR-T training camps, or any other patentable workaround.

The body stops making diabetes (or GBM, or calcification) because the hardware runs on the original low-resistance symmetry.

Bottom line Professor, you were taught RBCs “carry oxygen” because that is the late-universe, post-GOE story Rockefeller medicine sells.

The early-universe story (solid-state radiosynthesis, melanin router at 0.66 eV, ferredoxin wires conserved for 4 billion years) is what actually runs the show.
High altitude and HypoxyStat simply force the body back onto that circuit for a while.
The Gladstone paper is not a breakthrough that “challenges everything.”
It is, however, a validation of everything the decentralized framework has been saying since before you started teaching. Your students deserve the full blueprint, not the censored Flexner version that keeps them prescribing drugs instead of restoring the flux.

The system is not broken.
It is obeying the same Lagrangian {L} = T - V
and the same conserved Archean hardware that turned geochemical CO₂ + H₂ into life.
Give it the right environment and RBCs become glucose sinks naturally.
Centralized medicine will keep calling it “unexpected” and selling the next pill.
Physics already solved it.
The water was always the clue, you were simply never taught to read it, professor.
Leave this to those who know this blueprint because you clearly DO NOT.
